en.st_addon_scope_d0cter_descr: Docter as a brand was born in 1991, but the company started writing its story much earlier. It was previously called Carl Zeiss Jena. In the 1980s, this was one of the largest optics manufacturing companies in the world. They started operating more than 100 years ago and built an impeccable reputation throughout the years. After World War II, the company started growing rapidly and bloomed until East and West Germany merged in 1991. This was when the first major change happened – the company was taken over by Bernhard Docter. Shockingly, the company bankrupted. Analytic Jena Group bought Docter in 1997, and the company started growing again. In 2018, a change in administration occurred. The company was renamed from Docter to Noblex. Most of the products remained in the offer but Noblex added some new ones as well. They retained the famous logo – the owl. Throughout the years, Docter has been known to offer high-quality Made-in-Germany products for an affordable price. Because of that, the company gathered plenty of followers, loyal to the brand. Since 2018, when Noblex took over, the company expanded their manufacturing processes elsewhere.
en.st_addon_scope_deltapoint_descr: The DeltaPoint Pro is proof that you don’t have to compromise performance, even on a small sight. Its incredibly wide field-of-view and crystal-clear glass dominates the competition, while its rugged aluminum housing and steel sheath ensure it will perform in the harshest conditions. Ease-of-use was also a focus when designing this elite red dot sight, which is why we put an easy access battery compartment on top and gave it click-adjustments for more precision. And this isn’t just a pistol sight either; the DP Pro is just as at home on AR’s, shotguns, and pretty much anything else that goes bang.

en.st_addon_scope_ekp8_02_descr: The Cobra sight provides confident aiming in natural light conditions (bright sunny day, deep twilight and moonlit night) due to the presence of 16 levels of manual brightness adjustment of the aiming mark. The location of the aiming mark and target in the same plane allows for aiming with both one and two eyes, which creates an unlimited field of view for the shooter, and conduct effective high-speed shooting at quickly moving, small and suddenly appearing for a short time targets.
en.st_addon_scope_ekp8_18_descr: Kobra Military 8-18 Red Dot Weaver Rifle Scope, Screw Mount. The world famous Kobra is an open collimator "red dot" combat optic using laser-generated "heads-up display" (HUD) technology to superimpose a reticle pattern onto a filtered lens which acts as an aiming device for the shooter. This system presents an unobstructed field of view, in 1x power which allows for extremely comfortable, "both eyes open" shooting. On average, most users will see a 1.5 times faster target acquisition and a 50% smaller shot group at 100 meters, in comparison to the iron sights. It is designed for engaging fast moving targets and targets appearing for a short period of time in close quarters and urban combat situations in various light conditions. It provides clear targeting from 104 lx to 10-2 lx (daylight, twilight and moonlight), one- or two-eye targeting, is very effective when shooting from moving vehicles, and allows for perfect kill shots on fast-moving, small and spontaneously appearing targets.

en.st_addon_scope_mepro_descr: Meprolight Mepro M21 is a battle-proven red dot sight, tested in the harshest conditions imaginable. It doesn’t work on a battery but is powered by a fibre optic collector system during the day and by tritium at night – when all other sights fail, M21 will continue to work. With a QD-detachable mount, you will be able to mount and dismount this sight from the Picatinny platform in a matter of seconds. it can be paired with night vision goggles and scopes which greatly increases its usability. Meprolight is an Israeli company, founded in 1990. They offer includes day optical devices, night vision devices, thermal imaging devices, self-illuminated night sights, etc. Their products have been tested to withstand the harshest conditions imaginable, which is why they are popular with the military and law enforcement. The company complies with NATO and US military specifications as well as International MIL Standards.

en.st_adrenalin_descr:
Epinephrine (also known as adrenalin) is a hormone and a neurotransmitter. Epinephrine has many functions in the body, instantly regulating heart rate, blood vessel and air passage diameters, and metabolic shifts. Epinephrine release is a crucial component of the fight-or-flight response of the sympathetic nervous system. The effects lead to increased blood glucose and fatty acids, providing substrates for instant energy production within cells throughout the body.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  very potent alcohol sobering effect

en.st_af_aac_descr:
The Artefact Application Container (AAC) filters a moderate amount of radiation particles emitted from artefacts. This mechanical aluminium container is the most cost-efficient and thus the most popular way of handling artefacts as it allows the user to harness the power of more potent artefacts. Artefact filter is composed of multiple layers made primarily of lead, with one layer of thorium which has strong radiation shielding properties. This device has been manufactured by scientists residing in military bunkers around the Zone. In case of emergency or if no longer needed, the module can be utilised as a source of quality metal for use in outfit or helmet repairs. Currently unusable. To attach it to the belt, you have to put an artefact inside. The artefact will retain its characteristics with the exception of reduced radiation output.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: empty
en.st_af_aam_descr:
The Artefact Application Module (AAM) filters a significant amount of radiation particles emitted from artefacts. This advanced mechanical module is the most effective way of harnessing the power of most potent artefacts. Artefact filter is composed of numerous layers made of nano-carbon. It is hence lightweight and has strongest radiation shielding properties of all devices. Regarded as a symbol of affluence in the Zone. Most commonly used by the scientists to minimise the harmful effects of artefacts. Designed and manufactured in Ukraine by a government institute which provides equipment for the scientists residing in the Zone of Alienation. In case of emergency or if no longer needed, the module can be utilised as a source of quality metal for use in outfit or helmet repairs. Currently unusable. To attach it to the belt, you have to put an artefact inside. The artefact will retain its characteristics with the exception of reduced radiation output.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 23 mSv
  •  state: empty

en.st_af_baloon_af_aac_descr:
A compound of several hollow organic formations, this artefact emits a gaseous substance that can neutralise chemical or toxic particles inside the body without harming it. Thus providing a a great level of toxic and chemical protection. 
It also has a constant temperature regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. 
Apart from that Bubble, however, possesses numerous negative properties. For example, it greatly amplifies the effects of psy-waves as well as fields produced by mutants and anomalies. This disadvantage is not to be taken lightly: some stalkers have reported that psy influence was so potent when in possession of a Bubble that they felt their heads cracking from the inside and the only thing they could do was scream in pain and run as far as they could. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_black_descr: Very strange artefact, which behavior is similar to parasite. The black stone kills its owner, but in return increases power and treats open wounds, as if it does not want to share the blood of the owner.
en.st_af_black_spray_af_aac_descr:
Being a rare artefact, little is known about its properties and origins. 
Black Spray shares a similar shape to other sapphire-like artefacts. However, the organic nature of the stem (which shares similar properties to Pin artefacts) suggests that its formed from vascular plants under exposure to dangerous psy-fields and electromagnetic waves. 
Another unique property is the ability to delay the transmission of light that enters it. The said mysterious mechanism is applied to psy-waves surrounding the artefact as well. For this particular reason, Black Spray significantly neutralises psy interferences in a large radius. 
These beneficial properties, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed in toxic environments as it amplifies their effect and increases their potency. When exploring toxic areas, it is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack. 
Due to the beautiful blue aura it emits, it is highly sought after by jewellers all over the world. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_blood_af_aac_descr:
A reddish formation of compressed fossilised plants, soil and animal debris. Can partially neutralise chemical poisons by absorbing them and reducing overall toxicity level in user's bloodstream. Quite widespread and not very effective as it makes chemical burns fester. It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
Another positive effect possessed by this artefact is that it accelerates clotting if worn close to the body. Although it is not recommended to keep this artefact in your possession for longer periods of time as blood clots can be hazardous to your health. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_bracelet_af_aac_descr:
Bracelet is formed from common species of bryophytes plants under high exposure to radioactive and chemical anomalies, which explains its organic nature. 
It provides substantial protection against all types of acids by gradually increasing their pH to the level of water (pH of 7). 
When worn, the artefact is also known to slightly counter the harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of some mutants. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_brain_descr: This very rare artifact looks and feels like an exact copy of the brain, for which it is named. In case of injuries, it speeds up metabolic processes, which helps wounds to heal faster. It also weakens the effects of radiation.
en.st_af_bumerang_af_aac_descr: A rare, unique artifact. Has a small radioactive emission, increases resistance to thermal and electrical anomalies. Born in anomalous zones combining electra and fry.

en.st_af_bumerang_descr: A rare, unique artifact. Has a small radiation, increases resistance to thermal and electrical anomalies. Born in anomalous zones combining electra and fry.
en.st_af_camelbak_descr:
Borrowing its name from the myth that camels store water in their humps, the Camelbak is a pack worn on the back or around the waist of the user, containing a bladder that is filled with water to keep one hydrated. Flexible tube with a mouthpiece facilitates use even in most pressing situations. This model is camouflaged and integrated in the suit to protect the system from damage from any source, be it combat or anomaly. Because the container is made of a high-quality textile, experienced stalkers sometimes re-use scrapped camelbaks for quality materials to patch their field outfits.
 


WARNING:
 
Although water has low electrical conductivity, its proximity to the body may make you more vulnerable to electrical currents. For this reason, it is recommended to take special notice of your surroundings when in possession of a camelbak.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  can only wear one camelbak
en.st_af_camelbak_up_descr:
Improvements to the Camelbak keeps the stored water refreshingly cold, cooling the user passively and on drink. en.st_af_caterpillar_af_aac_descr:
Rare artefact that looks like a caterpillar. It was first found in Wild Territory away from any anomalies, so initially it was mistaken for a new creature in the Zone, but later it started to be found in anomalies. Allows to carry more in a backpack, restores strength and slightly removes radiation, but gradually saps health of the owner. Also with this artefact it is better not to approach sources of high temperature.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

An artefact of gravitational nature. A useless trinket, yet is highly valued by collectors and jewellers. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_ceramic_descr:
Made of hard carbide ceramics, this type of armor insert is used by armed forces all over the world due to its ability to protect against high-caliber threats. Known as the ESAPI in the west, it dissipates the energy of incoming projectiles by cracking the ceramic into pieces, protecting the wearer. However, this mechanism also makes its multi-hit protection poor. Ceramic inserts also tend to be quite thick, restricting movement.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class IV / BR5 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert
en.st_af_ceramic_up_descr:
A set of next-generation ceramic plates. Such plates have been developed by both the US and Russian armed forces to confront heavily-armed threats. Despite its ability to absorb impacts of high-caliber armor-piercing rounds, it was never widely adopted due to the extra weight and lack of threats utilizing such firepower.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class IV / BR6 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert
en.st_af_chelust_descr:
A very strange artefact. Generates a strong gravitational field while nothing touches it. Has no useful properties, very heavy. Valuable to collectors outside of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container

en.st_af_compass_af_aac_descr:
A very rare artefact. It's been several years since one was found. 
It can locate gaps in anomaly fields. It is believed that it can help one traverse the most complex anomaly fields completely unharmed. However, very few know how to handle it properly. 
The Compass showed few unique properties under last experiments. It can interact to moving objects, causing some to completely disappear. Or perhaps teleport? 
It also weakens the body by draining stamina and increasing bleeding rate constantly. But the biggest draw however, is the dangerous radiation output this artefact emits comparing to the artefact radiation scale. 
Holding this artefact near the body will cause death in matter of few minutes.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_cooler_descr:
Advanced thermoelectric cooler developed with Zone technology. Electrical currents transfer thermal energy away from the user's body to the surrounding area. Historically, thermoelectric coolers have seen limited effectiveness in the field due to a short lifetime of the conducting material, but research into thermal artifacts has produced several experimental alloys with a long effective lifetime as thermocoolers suitable to be used in the field. When a large amount of thermal energy makes contact with the user, the Body cooler activates and disperses the heat into the surrounding area. While more effective than the Freon Emission Module, the lack of active cooling makes it relatively less popular among Ecologists. In case of disassembly of the unit using a toolkit, the metal casing can be reused as outfit repair material.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  can only equip one environmental control unit
en.st_af_cooler_up_descr:
Advanced thermoelectric cooler developed with Zone technology. Improvements in the design and materials used have increased the efficiency of heat redirection, and additionally draws out small amounts of ionizing radiation from the user's body. Electrical currents transfer thermal energy away from the user's body to the surrounding area. Historically, thermoelectric coolers have seen limited effectiveness in the field due to a short lifetime of the conducting material, but research into thermal artifacts has produced several experimental alloys with a long effective lifetime as thermocoolers suitable to be used in the field. When a large amount of thermal energy makes contact with the user, the Body cooler activates and disperses the heat into the surrounding area. While more effective than the Freon Emission Module, the lack of active cooling makes it relatively less popular among Ecologists. In case of disassembly of the unit using a toolkit, the metal casing can be reused as outfit repair material.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  can only equip one environmental control unit

en.st_af_cristall_af_aac_descr:
This artefact is formed in anomalous zones with intense thermal activity. Actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. 
It will also protect the user against electrical currents. On the other hand, exposure to such environments makes the artefact increase the conductivity due to unknown as of now mechanism. For this reason, one is forced to weigh pros and cons of Crystal when in the vicinity of areas of high conductivity. 
This artefact is also highly sought for by jewellers outside the Zone as its inner core is not radioactive and considered to be of exceptional beauty if polished and refined. Only the first 1 cm of its outer layer emits radiation. 
It is, however, highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. Covered with very hard layer. Relatively heavy due to high density. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_cristall_flower_af_aac_descr:
This artefact resembles melted cheese interspersed with sapphire-like stones. Only yellow outer shell of the artefact appears to give off radiation and by careful processing it is possible to extract the non-radioactive blue parts for jewellery and other industrial purposes. This is due to the fact that if cleaned properly and polished, sapphire comparison becomes much more explicit: the stones are as hard and durable as this beautiful gem. This quality of theirs and their appearance make them perfect gemstones and jewellers all over the world strive to have them in stock. 
The usefulness of the artefact, however, is not limited to its industrial applications. There is scientific evidence suggesting that sapphire-like stones effectively protect from psy-waves, whereas the outer shell slightly increases resistance to toxicity. 
However, it can cause objects in its vicinity to heat up and in extreme cases to ignite along with the artefact. For this reason, it is safe to conclude that it absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. 
Due to its density the weight of artefact has increased beyond normal standards, and thus it is one of the heaviest anomalous creations in the Zone. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_crystal_oko_descr: This very rare artifact looks like an eye, which is why it was named. When injured, it speeds up metabolic processes, which promotes rapid healing of wounds. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_vyvert_af_aac_descr: A bizarrely shaped artifact that occurs in areas of increased gravitational activity. It is a kind of sponge that absorbs radioactive elements. en.st_af_dark_soul_descr: Малоизученный артефакт. Significantly increases stamina by utilizing the body's internal reserves, but is not in demand due to significant radioactivity.
en.st_af_death_lamp_af_aac_descr:
"Big, red and cursed." 
This is how the locals prefer to describe the Death Lamp, while some refer to it as the "Seed of Satan". Many traders believe the rumours surrounding the artefact, thus refusing to buy it. Little is known about its origins, and nothing of value has been discovered so far. 
Death Lamp was first discovered few years ago by a group of three experienced stalkers. Shortly after delivering the artefact to the Ecologists in Yantar, two of them found dead with a horrific expression on their faces. Nothing is known about the fate of the third stalker. 
Following the accident, members of the science team who studied the artefact had reported having nightmare disorder in the days to follow. 
Apart from the mysterious effects, the artefact drains vitality and willpower from the user, often on such a scale that it induces dizziness and in extreme cases causes the user to faint. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_deformer_af_aac_descr: A unique artifact. Was found in a single specimen on the rifts of Zaton. Increases resistance to all types of anomalies. Radioactive.

en.st_af_dummy_battery_af_aac_descr:
The artefact is quite popular in the Zone and is valued by its residents and visitors alike for its energizing properties, although it has an adverse effect on the body when used for prolonged periods of time. 
One should take note, however, that this artefact hinders blood clotting and increases bleeding rate of open wounds. On the other hand, being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. 
Being an artefact of electric nature, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. On the contrary, it should be noted that Battery absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. 
This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_dummy_dummy_af_aac_descr:
Shell is composed of two disk of bluish colour connected by semitransparent material of unknown nature. 
This strange artefact was considered devoid of any useful properties by many scientists for a long time. Only recently has it been discovered that it is indeed quite beneficial. 
When the artefact comes into contact with the body, it will make one feel rejuvenated and thus it increases stamina recovery. This effect has in case of some stalkers induced hyperactivity. One downside of this artefact, however, is that it reduces the number of platelets in blood, thus increasing bleeding rate. 
It provides a considerable level of psy protection and absorbs electromagnetic interference, acting as a grounding material. 
It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. Caution must be taken when approaching heat sources with this artefact. 
Shell is extremely light and very portable. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads3_descr: Well established that radiation from artefact's pulsation causes blood coagulation in open wounds. Also the artefact moderately protects against thermal effects. Radioactive.
en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads_af_aac_descr:
Shaped like a DNA helix, Mama's Beads are created in the Burner anomaly. One of their most characteristic features is that they constantly pulsate, generating emissions beneficial to the human body. These emissions increase the metabolism of any living creature, accelerating coagulation and healing of wounds.The mechanism behind the effects of this artefact is still unknown. 
Mama's Beads also possess potent protective qualities: they are able to shield the body and objects from extreme heat. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
The weight is also quite high for such a small artefact, which leads to a conclusion that is of high density. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  state: full

These emissions increase the metabolism of any living creature, accelerating coagulation and healing of wounds.The mechanism behind the effects of this artefact is still unknown. 
Mama's Beads also possess potent protective qualities: they are able to shield the body and objects from extreme heat. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
The weight is also quite high for such a small artefact, which leads to a conclusion that is of high density. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 7 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_electra_flash_af_aac_descr:
This artefact is very similar in appearance to Moonlight and resembles a plasma globe or a plasma lamp. 
Being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. 
When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. Flash acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. 
However, it also hinders healing process, thus caution is advised especially when wounded or bleeding. This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_electra_moonlight_af_aac_descr:
This unique electrostatic artefact can resonate under the influence of psy-waves. Stalkers have learned to fine-tune the artefact so that it resonates in opposite phase to the main source of emissions, thus significantly neutralizing their effects. This orb of considerable beauty also increases electrical protection by reducing conductivity in the body when exposed to high levels of electricity. 
It should be noted that Moonlight will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_electra_sparkler_af_aac_descr:
This artefact has the appearance of translucent spider webs. Just as proteinaceous spider silk, it is sticky and has properties of glue. 
It can be found most commonly in or near electro anomalies and it seems to have absorbed their certain characteristics: it is able to smooth fluctuations in electric field density and acts as a weak resistor, protecting the wearer from electricity and reducing its damaging effects. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases the corrosiveness of acids, leading to accelerated deterioration of equipment and higher damage to tissues of any living organism. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_empty_af_aac_descr:
Two disks of organic formation (commonly lipids, cellulose and lignin) with nothing but empty space in between. This is due to a unique gravitation field formed in the centre that stabilise the distance between the disks. 
Any attempt to press the disks together, or pull them apart will fail due to rapid positive/negative changes in the gravitational field. As if the artefact reacts to any physical power that breaks its balance. 
Because of this mechanism, moving with an Empty is a hard task. As the gravitational field increases the density of surrounding air and slows the body down. 
The real usefulness of this effect comes to the ability to reduce friction, thus obtaining great protection against physical impacts. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_eye_af_aac_descr:
This artefact, which resembles the human eye, considerably increases metabolism of the body, helping wounds heal quicker. Experienced stalkers say that Eye also brings luck. Irrespective of the validity of that statement, its positive effects are indeed quite potent. 
This artefact soothes the pain and is extremely useful when treating wounds. 
When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. 
These beneficial qualities, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed to chemical anomalies as it amplifies their toxicity and increases their potency. It is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack, never on the body, when exploring toxic areas unless you have a death wish. 
The artefact is also known colloquially as "copper eye" as it conducts electricity and amplifies its dangerous effects in the same way as copper does. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_fire_af_aac_descr:
This artefact forms in areas of high thermal activity. Produces powerful infrared emissions which intensify metabolic processes, healing wounds before its bearer's very eyes. 
Its healing capabilities are even stronger than in case of the Eye as stalkers in possession of this artefact are said to have survived being wounded by chimeras. Thanks to that, it has earned the reputation of a miraculous artefact. 
Many stalkers owe it their lives, and most veteran mutant hunters carry it in case they run into danger. However, it shares not only positive but also negative properties of its cousin: entering a psy-field with this artefact on the belt is suicide. It will absorb psy energy and emitting it at a considerable rate. 
Also, it is highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. 
It can also be used as a reusable medkit of sorts since it heals wounds very quickly. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_fireball_af_aac_descr:
It is a spherical artefact made of red-coloured crystal, created in the Burner anomaly. 
It has an unique property: it has a constant temperature of 75 degrees Fahrenheit/24 degrees Celsius, regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. 
A dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies.It is quite heavy due to high density of crystal-like material. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_frames_descr:
>A decent-quality aluminum frame used to more efficiently distribute the weight of your pack. Aluminum is a relatively light and strong metal, and serves well as a means to distribute weight at the cost of making the user more conductive to electricity. Adjustable straps and harnesses allow the frame to be adjusted to any torso size, and flexible plastic elements used in key parts of the construction allow for a surprising amount of flexibility when sprinting. The grid replaces the main framework of your backpack, and as such cannot be worn with exoskeletons. Although the system is built of light aluminium, some parts can still prove useful for minor outfit repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  can only wear one back frame
  •  incompatible with exoskeletons
en.st_af_frames_up_descr:
Improvements to the aluminum frames have increased its overall comfort and weight distribution, while also providing a psy-dampening effect. A decent-quality aluminum frame used to more efficiently distribute the weight of your pack. Aluminum is a relatively light and strong metal, and serves well as a means to distribute weight at the cost of making the user more conductive to electricity. Adjustable straps and harnesses allow the frame to be adjusted to any torso size, and flexible plastic elements used in key parts of the construction allow for a surprising amount of flexibility when sprinting. The grid replaces the main framework of your backpack, and as such cannot be worn with exoskeletons. Although the system is built of light aluminium, some parts can still prove useful for minor outfit repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  can only wear one back frame
  •  incompatible with exoskeletons
en.st_af_freon_descr:
The freon emission module maintains a constant temperature around the body at the level of 20 degrees Celsius by emitting a thick layer of freon cooled air particles around the user that absorb excess heat and reduce the ambient temperature in the user's immediate vicinity. Often used by Ecologists to reduce the impact of thermal anomalies as well as to keep cool in their SSP suits.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  can only equip one environmental control unit
en.st_af_freon_up_descr:
Improvements to the freon emission module have increased the output of cooled air, both improving its thermal protective capabilities as well as cooling the user significantly, increasing endurance. The freon emission module maintains a constant temperature around the body at the level of 20 degrees Celsius by emitting a thick layer of freon cooled air particles around the user that absorb excess heat and reduce the ambient temperature in the user's immediate vicinity. Often used by Ecologists to reduce the impact of thermal anomalies as well as to keep cool in their SSP suits.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  can only equip one environmental control unit
en.st_af_full_empty_af_aac_descr:
Similar to Empty, this artefact consist of two disks of organic formation connected by a unique gravitational field in between. However, the said field in Full Empty is extraordinary: all atoms entering the centre, regardless of their nature, become interactive under the unknown effects of the field. Thus releasing photons (light emitting). 
Scientists usually refer to it as the "galaxy effect", which gives the artefact an exceptional orbit of light. 
The density increment of surrounding air caused by moving is higher comparing to Empty. Because of this, the artefact will greatly hinder its holder's movement. 
Being superior artefact to Empty, the protection against physical impacts is remarkable. Some claims that Full Empty is capable of stopping 9mm bullets fired at point blank. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_fuzz_kolobok_af_aac_descr:
A relatively rare artefact forming in chemical areas, Kolobok is highly valued for its ability to heal most kinds of wounds and stop bleeding in a matter of minutes. 
For unknown reasons, scientists are spreading rumours among stalkers that the artefact modifies bearer's genetic code, which is unproven and should be regarded as conscious attempt at monopolizing the supply of the artefact by the scientific community. This does not, however, mean that it is completely harmless. 
One drawback of this artefact is the fact that it will interact to radioactive particles, so it is best to avoid radiation fields when in possession of the artefact, especially since its negative effects are not balanced with positive ones. It will also reduce energy recovery, which is the result of its sharp needle-like appendages. The needles cause small and quickly healing wounds which bring constant pain and itch, thus reducing stamina. 
This artefact also weakens protection against heat and acids due to its high flammability. 
Lightweight and not too much of a burden to carry around. 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_glass_af_aac_descr:
Firefly interacts with fields unknown to science, considerably speeding up regeneration of tissue and organs in living beings, as well as normalizing metabolic processes. 
This artefact can literally get a badly wounded stalker back on his feet in a matter of minutes. On the other hand, Firefly can spontaneously combust when exposed to potent radioactive sources. 
A big downside to this artefact is that it weakens the body and reduce the number of platelets in blood during heal process, thus increasing bleeding rate. 
It seems to drain stamina and decrease stamina recovery greatly as well. Some of those who used Firefly for its healing purposes have reported that they couldn't walk for hours afterwards. 
Unfortunately, Firefly is extremely rare. 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_gold_fish_af_aac_descr:
Direct successor to and a superior version of Gravi artefact. As was the case with Gravi, it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who discovered its unique properties after a massive blowout/emission hit the Zone. 
Thanks to meticulous research that followed, it was established that this new artefact is produced when three Gravi artefacts interact and get sucked into one another's singularity fields. This phenomenon is extremely rare, due to which the artefact is highly valued. 
It is rumoured within Ukrainian Spetsnaz circles that in the Zone there are agents from the Ministry of Defence of the Russian Federation whose sole objective is acquiring and transporting Goldfish to specialised laboratories located outside of the Zone. 
The artefact creates a constant anti-gravitational singularity field which affects only its closest vicinity. However, some stalkers have been known to disappear for no apparent reason leaving only a Goldfish behind. 
Big downside, however, comes along with this powerful anti-gravitational field: the velocity of moving objects inside its radius will rapidly increase, causing dangerous impacts on surrounding objects, including the holder. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

Thanks to meticulous research that followed, it was established that this new artefact is produced when three Gravi artefacts interact and get sucked into one another's singularity fields. This phenomenon is extremely rare, due to which the artefact is highly valued. 
It is rumoured within Ukrainian Spetsnaz circles that in the Zone there are agents from the Ministry of Defence of the Russian Federation whose sole objective is acquiring and transporting Goldfish to specialised laboratories located outside of the Zone. 
The artefact creates a constant anti-gravitational singularity field which affects only its closest vicinity. However, some stalkers have been known to disappear for no apparent reason leaving only a Goldfish behind. 
Big downside, however, comes along with this powerful anti-gravitational field: the velocity of moving objects inside its radius will rapidly increase, causing dangerous impacts on surrounding objects, including the holder. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  full isolation
  •  state: full

en.st_af_gravi_af_aac_descr:
Gravi is formed from metallic substances exposed to prolonged gravitation. This makes it capable of sustaining an powerful anti-gravitational field, which causes it to have various properties, among others reducing weight of all objects in its close proximity. For a long time, the artefact was a mystery, and it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who first discovered that Gravi creates a minute singularity field of anti-gravitational nature, the phenomenon which occurs in intervals of 30 minutes. 
A dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
Another downside is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_grid_descr:
A high-quality titanium grid used to more efficiently distribute the weight of your pack. Titanium's light weight and high strength makes it a superior alternative to back frames constructed of aluminum, although it shares the same conductive properties as other metal frames. Adjustable straps and harnesses allow the grid to be adjusted to any torso size, and flexible plastic elements used in key parts of the construction allow for a surprising amount of flexibility when sprinting. The grid replaces the main framework of your backpack, and as such cannot be worn with exoskeletons. Grids are created from very high quality titanium, thus disassembled grid can be used as an effective combat outfit or helmet repair supplement.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  high quality
  •  can only wear one back frame
  •  incompatible with exoskeletons
en.st_af_grid_up_descr:
Improvements to the titanium grid have increased its overall comfort and weight distribution, while also providing a psy-dampening effect. en.st_af_iam_descr:
The Improvised Application Module (IAM) filters a small amount of radiation particles emitted from artefacts. This mechanical metal pouch is the cheapest device that allows the user to harness the power of less potent artefacts. Artefact filter is composed of multiple layers made primarily of lead which shield from radiation. A low-cost alternative to the more reliable AAC and AAM. In case of emergency or if no longer needed, the module can be utilised as a source of quality metal for use in outfit or helmet repairs. Currently unusable. To attach it to the belt, you have to put an artefact inside. The artefact will retain its characteristics with the exception of reduced radiation output.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 7 mSv
  •  state: empty

en.st_af_ice_af_aac_descr:
Also colloquially known as "Radioactive Snowflake". At first glance, this artefact resembles a white Kolobok. 
Thanks to its unique properties, the artefact can significantly increase the bearer's muscle tone, thus greatly improving stamina recovery. Due to its high radioactivity, stalkers in possession of it are sometimes jokingly referred to as "Radioactive Snowflakes". 
When faced with the decision whether to carry it on the belt during a mission, you have to carefully weigh its pros and cons: does it pay to have greater endurance and high protection against electricity at the cost of being constantly exposed to its deadly radiation? Even if you are determined to take it with you, it should be noted that it is not to be used on long excursions to the Zone. 
Snowflake, however, holds a big downside: it interacts with surrounding energy sources by absorbing and amplifying their effects. For this reason, approaching heat sources, toxic areas and psy-fields while holding this artefact is a suicide. 
It is as light as a snowflake and very easy to carry around. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_itcher_af_aac_descr:
A formation of thermal nature. The Itcher consists of two separated layers. The surface is a hard, dense metamorphic rock with deep scars covering the entire body. Completely inactive and doesn't hold any noticeable properties. On the other hand, the soft, yellow glowing core is from unknown organic nature. It actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. 
However, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_kevlar_descr:
Kevlar plates are widely known for their protective capabilities, and are highly valued because of their incredible strength-to-weight ratio. They perform a wide variety of functions, the most important of which is absorbing the impact of firearm projectiles on the front and the back of the torso. While incredibly lightweight and effective against small-caliber handgun rounds, they are easily defeated by any rifle round.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class II / BR3 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert

en.st_af_lighthouse_descr:
A clot of superdense substance. Contains valuable materials that are used in production, so there is a huge demand for it in the area unaffected by the Zone. Not radioactive, Has no useful properties.

en.st_af_lobster_eyes_af_aac_descr:
As the name suggests, this artefact has the shape of two eggs fused together. The outer surface is very thick, the high density of its formation might be the reason behind its deep colour. 
This artefact offers slightly more psy-protection than its cousin, Stone Flower. It resonates under the influence of psy-waves to some degree and absorbs the dangerous effect. 
Another positive property is the ability to consume excessive heat while remaining cool at all times. 
Due to its density of the surface, the Lobster Eyes is quite heavy. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_medusa_af_aac_descr:
Very common in the Zone. This gravitational artefact is able to slightly shield the body and objects from physical impacts. 
It will slightly protect its user against extreme heat produced respectively by fire anomalies. 
This artefact is quite heavy as the gravitational field seems to increase mass. Another downside to this artefact is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_mincer_meat_af_aac_descr:
This artefact has soft, porous, skin-like texture and is said to be able to compress. It resembles and acts like a sponge in this regard, but reveals its special characteristics only when exposed to certain external conditions. 
Firstly, to carry the sponge metaphor further, the pores on its surface are known to absorb small amounts of toxicity from environment. 
Secondly, the artefact slightly amplifies the damaging effects of psy-fields to living organisms by absorbing psy energy and emitting it at a small rate. 
Thirdly, Meat Chunk is also known to be a conductor of electricity much like the skin of a living creature. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.

  •  state: full

en.st_af_monolith_descr: The origins of artefacts such as this one are a mystery, as they are rarely found outside the northernmost parts of the Zone. \nThis unique artefact projects a non-contact field that inhibits nearbly anomalous phenomena. This grants the wearer a notable level of protection against most of the Zone's environmental hazards. It is also one of the few active artefacts that can be safely handled without lead containers. However, when you hold it your flesh feels dry and flaky, your bones hard and stiff, the ligaments in your joints squeaky and brittle. Thick armour or great supernatural vitality would be needed by anyone intending to wear this artefact into battle.
en.st_af_morf_descr: Unstudied, radioactive formation, born in chemical structure anomalies.

en.st_af_night_star_af_aac_descr:
This glowing artefact can generate a local directed low-gravity field. Widely used by stalkers along with Gravi, a similar artefact, to increase maximum load. 
Due to its beautiful inner core it is highly sought after by jewellers all over the world, however it is best to proceed with caution as unskilled treatment can cause the artefact to explode with power sufficient to level a small building. It is thus highly advised to perform the polishing by means of specialised machinery, which minimises the probability of explosion. Moreover, only the outer core of the artefact emits radiation. 
Nightstar will also absorb toxic and chemical agents from the environment, which makes it a valuable artefact for artefact hunters, although the amount of toxicity absorbed is negligible. It is, however, relatively cheap and even stalkers with pretty tight budgets can afford it if opportunity to buy it arises. 
That being said, Nightstar emits odour of burning flesh when in the closest proximity of heat source. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_oasis_heart_af_aac_descr:
This artefact was found at the centre of the legendary Oasis. It appears that the Heart is a crystallised plant, which has acquired the healing properties of the Oasis. 
Not only it dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds and healing process, but also provides the body with strong source of energy. It is a true miracle. 
That being said, the Oasis is very sensitive to outer sources of energy and surrounding environment. For this reason, interacting with anomaly fields will bring death to the holder. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_pero_af_aac_descr: A very rare artifact, so many vagabonds categorize its existence as a baize. Has slight radiation, but increases resistance to chemical structure anomalies. In addition, if placed in a backpack, it significantly lightens the weight of the contents, almost twice as much.

en.st_af_pero_descr: A very rare artifact, so many wanderers attribute its existence to baes. Has slight radiation, but increases resistance to chemical structure anomalies. In addition, if placed in a backpack, it significantly lightens the weight of the contents, almost doubling the weight.
en.st_af_pin_af_aac_descr:
A small artefact formed by thermal anomalies in the Zone under extreme temperatures. The look of this artefact suggests that it was an organ of a vascular plant. Further studies showed that other organic tissues are fused deep inside. 
The stem doesn't hold any useful properties. On the contrary, the small pins reduce temperature of user's body and cool all objects in their vicinity. 
This artefact offers a slight psy-protection as it will resonate under the influence of psy-waves. On the other hand, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

The stem doesn't hold any useful properties. On the contrary, the small pins reduce temperature of user's body and cool all objects in their vicinity. 
This artefact offers a slight psy-protection as it will resonate under the influence of psy-waves. On the other hand, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.

en.st_af_plates_descr:
These steel plates are specially crafted, heat treated and shaped for ballistic defeating properties, fitting a wide variety of protective applications. They are designed to withstand ballistic impacts on the front and the back of the torso. This protection, however, comes at a price as the thick steel plates are incredibly heavy.
 


WARNING:
 
Steel is a conductor and its proximity to the skin makes the body more vulnerable to electricity. For this reason, it is suggested to proceed with caution when near electrical anomalies or other sources of electricity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class III+ / BR4 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert
en.st_af_plates_up_descr:
A set of extremely heavy hardened-steel armor inserts. While they will protect against some high-caliber rounds, have good multi-hit capability, and are reasonably cheap, these benefits come at the cost of high weight. For this reason, soldiers of armies have opted for lighter ceramic inserts, while steel inserts such as these are mainly purchased by civilians. In the Zone, steel plates are often worn by STALKERs in exoskeletons, allowing them to easily carry the extra weight.
 


WARNING:
 
Steel is a conductor and its proximity to the skin makes the body more vulnerable to electricity. For this reason, it is suggested to proceed with caution when near electrical anomalies or other sources of electricity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class IV / BR5 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert

en.st_af_polymer_descr:
Polyethylene (PE) is widely used in a variety of industrial and commercial products due to its simple nonreactive chemical structure and versatile properties. Ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene (UHMWPE), which comprises these armor inserts, provides incredible protective strength for its low weight. Incoming projectiles locally melt the polymer through friction, trapping the bullet within the insert. This mechanism gives PE plates unparallelled multi-hit protection capability. However, UHMWPE is very expensive, and cannot fully stop higher-caliber projectiles on its own.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class III / BR4 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert
en.st_af_polymer_up_descr:
One of the most recent advances in personal armor comes in the form of a composite armor insert composed of a hard ceramic impact layer backed with an ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene (UHMWPE) reinforcing layer to prevent penetration. While neither as protective against high-calibers as thicker full-ceramic plates, nor as capable for multi-hit protection as UHMWPE-only plates, it manages to protect against a majority of threats while still being lighter than most inserts. However, it's high expense has delayed mass adoption by the world's armed forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  provides Class IV / BR5 protection
  •  can only equip one armor insert

en.st_af_repei_descr:
It is quite often spawned by anomalies of a gravitational nature. It has no valuable properties, but the absence of any harmful effects on the body makes it a must-have for many stalkers. Light, and very valued by jewellers and collectors. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_ring_af_aac_descr:
A very small artefact of electric nature. Difficult to spot. Consists of two ring-shaped materials of organic nature, hence the given name. When the Ring spins, it never stops spinning, defying the first law of thermodynamics. Scientists suggest that this artefact inherits gravitational properties from Vortex anomalies. 
The outer ring has a high-conductivity. It absorbs electrical current from relative sources then ground it in the inner ring. Despite the basic function, the mechanism behind the disappearance of electrical power inside the second ring is still unknown. 
On the other side, the Ring is flammable. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_rusty_kristall_af_aac_descr:
Crystallizes in the anomaly Burnt Fuzz. Naturally takes out the radiation from the organism. That is, through the ears along with some amount of blood. Blood loss is possible also through over openings. Widespread and quite effective, which is the cause for the stable price in the artefact market.

en.st_af_rusty_sea_urchin_af_aac_descr:
The anomaly Burnt Fuzz very rarely gives rise to this artefact. Raise the blood pressure and so, the body gets rid of a large amount of red blood cells. But along with them the stored radiation leaves the body as well. In his fundamental work titled 'Ionization and polarization of the components of rare artefacts', Sakharov noted that the content of this formation has a critical stability, and it's not realistic to create such an artefact in lab conditions in the next ten years.

en.st_af_soul_af_aac_descr:
Soul is a unique organic artefact with properties just as unique: it secretes slimy goo that dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds. Thanks to its reasonable price and attractive appearance, this artefact is a valuable collector's item. 
Applying its gooey substance to wounds will soothes the pain and speeds up healing process. \It also reduces the effects of psy-waves and their damage to one's brain. But it should be known that Soul drains power from its user. The artefact does not have high density and thus is not very heavy. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_af_sponge_af_aac_descr:
Sponge has always been under debate among the Ecologists. Some suggest that this artefact is driven from basic form of organisms, while others believe its an advanced life form with self-awareness inherited from living creatures. 
Despite the theories surrounding the artefact, all can agree on one thing: it moves. The sponge sometimes tries to "grab" an object it touches. Putting it in a container might be a hard task, as if it wants to escape. 
This artefact acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. On the other hand, it will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_surge_descr:
A small albeit advanced device consisting of what amounts to a very large resistor circuit with rubberized padding. It protects the user by reducing or limiting the effective amount of electricity that comes into direct contact with the body through either absorbing the electricity or diverting it to ground. Shocks received while wearing a Surge Suppressor are reduced from harmful or potentially fatal levels down to safe levels if not negated entirely. It is thus of vital importance to have a surge suppressor on your belt when in proximity of electrical anomalies and other sources of electricity in the Zone. However, while the system can mitigate moderate amounts of electricity effectively, high-voltage shocks can still overwhelm its protective capabilities. As with all metal objects, it can be used as a source of repair material as long as one has appropriate tools and enough skill.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  can only equip one environmental control unit
en.st_af_surge_up_descr:
An improved surge suppressor that additionally redirects a fraction of the absorbed electrical current to stimulate the user's tissues and muscules. increasing endurance. Excess energy leads to the regeneration of damaged tissues. The improved design also enhanced the device's surge protection capabilities, allowing the user to survive stronger electrical shocks. Like any electronic object, it can be used as a repair material with appropriate tools and skills.
 


WARNING:
 
It should be noted that such a module will not be able to work properly and provide sufficient protection if your suit does not meet the minimum protection requirements while in an abnormal field.
 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  can only equip one environmental control unit

en.st_af_vyvert_af_aac_descr:
This bizarrely-shaped artefact appears in places with increased gravitational activity. 
Although it appears almost organic, it is actually more similar to coral. Due to its gravitational nature, It provides protection against physical impacts as it greatly reduces the friction caused by fast objects. 
Acting as a kind of sponge that absorbs chemical and toxic elements as well, this artefact provides protection from external toxic agents as well as from chemical particles that have already made their way into the body. 
Wrenced can generate a locally directed gravity field which increases its mass. For this reason, this artefact is heavy. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full

en.st_ammo_box_descr:
Every stalker is aware of the importance of reliable weaponry. That's the reason a daily and thorough examination of your shooter is vital to your survival. Stalkers often count their ammo and clean it to minimise the risk of a weapon jam in the heat of battle.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_analgetic_descr:
Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug from the group of phenylacetic acid derivatives. The effect of the drug dulls the user's nervous activity. Because of the huge number of side effects, such as headache, dizziness, drowsiness, and in some cases memory disorders, disorientation, irritability, it is not used for medicinal purposes in most countries. However, in the Zone it has become popular due to a side effect expressed in violation of the sensitivity of the central nervous system, which allows it to withstand severe injuries, such as gunshot and shrapnel wounds.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 2%hp on use
  •  Restores 0.05%hp/s, total 50%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  average damage resistance bonus
en.st_antibio_chlor_descr:
An antibiotic. Crystalline powder of golden yellow colour, bitter taste, soluble in water. This is one of the first open antibiotics (after penicillin).
 Chlorotetracycline hydrochloride has a bacteriostatic effect on gram-positive and gram-negative microbes, rickettsia and some large viruses.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  average increase in drowsiness
en.st_antibio_sulfad_descr:
Sulfanilamide medication, effective against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria. It acts on pneumococci, streptococci, staphylococcus, E. coli, Klebsiella stick (Friedlander's stick), causative agents of dysentery; is less active with respect to the protein; is active against the trachoma virus (an infectious eye disease that can lead to blindness); It does not act on strains of bacteria resistant to other sulfanilamide preparations. Adverse effects include headaches, digestive disorders, skin rashes, fevers and leukopenia. The effects of the drug are long-lasting.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 1.5%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
en.st_antiemetic_descr:
Tablets coated with a shell, containing 4.6 and 10 mg of perphenazine. The drug is a neuroleptic - an antipsychotic agent that provides antiallergic, sedative, miorelaxing, antiemetic, weak anticholinergic, hypotensive and hypothermic actions. The efficacy of Etperazine is due to the blockade of D2 receptors in the mesocortical and mesolimbic systems. Rarely used in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  imported
  •  anti-inflammatory
en.st_antirad_cystamine_descr:
A substance functioning as a radioprotector, used to weaken the effects of radiation on the body. The radioprotective effect of cystamine is based on the ability to bind free radicals - ionised and excited molecules formed in tissues upon irradiation - as well as the ability of the drug to interact with certain enzymes and impart resistance to ionising radiation. The effects of cystamine do not counteract already accumulated radiation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  mild dizziness
en.st_antirad_descr:
Mexaminum radiation protection drugs are common in the Zone. When used, this drug induces contraction of peripheral blood vessels and oxygen deprivation, which serve to treat and prevent radiation exposure. The drug does not have severe side effects, although isolated cases of mild nausea, dizziness, cramps and stomach pain have been reported.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 5%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_antirad_kalium_descr:
A pharmacological compound, used in the Zone as a cheap means of countering the effects of radiation on the body. Causes numerous side effects, notably gastrointestinal tract blistering, numbness to pain and dysfunction of the thyroid gland.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 8%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  mild dizziness
en.st_armor_repair_fa_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and light headgear sets
 
 A repair set allowing the user to perform emergency repairs of outfits. Includes military grade ducktape and ready-to-use sheets of thick textile in a variety of shapes and sizes which make it possible to quickly patch up any outfit damage. This is especially useful to prevent further structural damage of already damaged suits. Due to a relatively low durability of provided materials, the kit can be used only for minor repairs and is ineffective in case of harder materials like kevlar or metal. For this reason, the kit has a very limited use in headgear maintenance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  fast usage (adhesive tape)
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_army_bowler_descr:
This army kettle features a convex-concave bottom profile, concave on one side. It is supplied with a wire handle-loop for hanging and carrying. When worn on the waist belt, the concave side should be placed to the body. The bowl cover can be used as a pan when heating or preparing a second dish. The handle of the lid is designed to hold it, securely closing the lid when carrying, and a tablespoon is inserted into the special holes on the handle.
 
 NOTES:
 
 Since fuels used in the multi-fuel stove are much more efficient energy-carriers than the wood or coal, the multi-fuel stove is - in the long run - significantly more cost-effective than traditional wood or coal stoves. On the other hand, these fuels are usually carried in heavy metal containers, which makes them more suited for use at bases, rather than in field operations.
 
 Mutant meats that do not require high temperature to be prepared are referred to as 'low-tier', whereas those that require high temperature - 'high-tier'.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  medium-tier field cooking equipment
  •  fuel:  charcoal
  •  usable on campfires  •  usable for cooking meats of lesser mutants
en.st_army_fp_descr:
This faction emblem is a full military coat of arms. It depicts three heater shields, the centermost one in the colours of the Ukrainian flag with two swords in saltire behind it. Encircling these shields are golden laurels. The Military forces in the Zone seem to fancy themselves as protectors and peacekeepers first and foremost. In reality, whether or not these Zone forces even try to fulfill this role is a topic of bitter contention.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_army_isg_spy_pendrive_descr: According to Degtyarev's somewhat cryptic briefing, the spy among UNISG has been collecting some information on their goals and movements, as well as evidence that could place legal or political pressure on the UN troops to leave the Zone. Obviously encrypted.
en.st_axe2_descr:
Most commonly employed by firefighters, this heavy axe is often used by stalkers for felling trees, or, like all great things, repurposed for hacking apart one's enemies, living or dead. Thus, it can serve as a formidable weapon in the hands of a skilled stalker.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  melee weapon
  •  has greater reach compared to knives
  •  everyday item
en.st_axe3_descr:
Used for thousands of years for cutting wood, hacking flesh, and even as a ceremonial object, this convenient axe comes in many shapes, though always consisting of a cleaver and handle. In a place like the Zone, this axe can mean both life and death.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  melee weapon
  •  has greater reach compared to knives
  •  everyday item
en.st_axe_descr:
An axe (or ax) is an implement that has been used for millennia to shape, split and cut wood, to harvest timber, as a weapon, and as a ceremonial or heraldic symbol. The axe has many forms but generally consists of an axe head with a handle, or helve. In the Zone, the axe can ensure your survival thanks to its versatility.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  melee weapon
  •  has greater reach compared to knives
  •  everyday item
en.st_bad_psy_helmet_desc: An uncalibrated psy-helmet designed to fit under regular headgear. It was developed under the leadership of Sakharov at the research station near Yantar. The unique layout of the helmet, consisting of electrical artefacts together with the device’s mounted antennas operate on the principle of the shield. When activated, the helmet projects an invisible dome near the carrier, acting on the energised particles released by the Shell artefact, thanks to which most of the radiation is extinguished, then the remnants are reflected by the protection system built directly into the helmet’s body. The uniqueness of this Psy-helmet lies in its ability to withstand the unusual mind-altering psy-frequencies of the various DUGA emitters within the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone.
en.st_ball_hammer_descr:
Also known as a machinist's hammer. Ball-peen hammer is a type of peening hammer used in metalworking. Despite being old and rusty, you can never go wrong with having one for small repair jobs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_balon_gas_descr:
WARNING: Explodes upon impact
 
 Heavy metal gas balloon impregnated with compatible polymer on the inside and on the outside with Hypalon for weather abrasion and UV resistance. This gas holder balloon is a collapsible, intermediated storage tank for any industrial gas, prior to bottling under pressure. In the Zone such canisters most often contain a composition of methane, propane, ethane and butane, and can be used for cooking or heating as well as for combat purposes. Upon direct gunfire, the canister may ignite and after a short while a rapid release of a considerable amount of energy may follow, causing the gas in the balloon to expand instantly and resulting in a delayed but powerful explosion with metal shrapnel going in every direction. Such canisters have been utilised as a weapon in the feuds between factions in the Zone killing many and crippling even more. If emptied, the balloon can be utilised for armour repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  technological item
  •  contains:  refined natural gas
  •  hi-tier cooking fuel
  •  triggering mechanism: bullet impact or explosion
  •  blast power: very high
  •  blast radius: 6.4 m
  •  fragments' radius: 36 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 28 (heavy metal fragments)
  •  explosion delay: ~2 seconds
en.st_balon_gas_empty_descr:
Emptied heavy metal gas balloon impregnated with compatible polymer on the inside and on the outside with Hypalon for weather abrasion and UV resistance. This gas holder balloon is a collapsible, intermediated storage tank for any industrial gas, prior to bottling under pressure. In the Zone such canisters most often contain a composition of methane, propane, ethane and butane, and can be used for cooking or heating as well as for combat purposes. It is empty now, but you can still put it to good use in outfit maintenance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
en.st_bandage_descr:
A normal elastic bandage used to stop bleeding and prevent infection of wounds. For regular bleeding, carefully apply the bandage to the wound. For arterial bleeding, urgently tie the bandage around the affected area.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  first-aid item
  •  fast usage (adhesive plaster)
en.st_bandit_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a cracked black skull set against a white shield. This symbol is highly in keeping with the vision held by some of the faction's leaders - that they are no mere thugs, but rather the lords of feudal mobs, bringing order to those who accept their "protection" and visiting ruthless retribution upon anyone who dares defy them.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable

en.st_barrel_11_descr: barrel from an automatic special purpose 9mm or PP rifle.\n \n
en.st_barrel_12_descr: barrel from the infamous or even legendary PPSh submachine gun system.\n \n
en.st_barrel_2_descr: barrel from an 18.5mm cock double-barrel shotgun.\n \n
en.st_barrel_6_descr: barrel with an integrated silencer from an automatic special purpose 9mm rifle.\n \n
en.st_barrel_7_descr: barrel from a semi-automatic or automatic 7.62mm rifle.\n \n
en.st_batteries_descr:
A pack of batteries. Someone must have used them since they are already half drained. Intended for use in your flashlight, PDA, nightvision goggles and other electronic devices. Remember to change regularly.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
en.st_beadspread_descr:
Luxury item in the Zone. Since there are only a few beds in safehouses in the Zone, having a sleeping bag and a bed spread may prove essential if you don't want to hit the wall in most inappropriate of circumstances. Bed spreads are included in the equipment of some military units.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item

Canned baked beans brought from the West. These haricot beans in tomato sauce may bring back nice memories to some people.

Ukrainian beer. Another - beside vodka - popular beverage in the Zone.

en.st_binocular_descr: Standard Ukrainian-issue military binoculars. Useful in the Zone in that they allow its owner to observe things from a distance. Very durable.\n

en.st_bolts_pack_descr:
Because bolts are cheap and common, they are used as a cheap alternative for anomalies navigation. Small packs that contains a handful amount of bolts and empty bullets can always be found at traders and merchants.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  contains 20 to 30 bolts
en.st_bolty_descr:
An ordinary rusty bolt, often used by novices and experienced stalkers alike to build safe pathways among anomalies.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_boots_descr:
Everyone is aware of the importance of good gear. An extra pair of boots can prove extremely useful and may be the object of envy of other stalkers since it is such a rarity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  personal belongings
en.st_bottle_metal_descr:
Metal bottle containing a portion of what seems to be Zone-produced vodka. It doesn't smell right and the fumes are strong.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  strong, low quality alcohol
en.st_box_matches_descr:
A box of matches is the second most important item in the Zone after a weapon. With the help of matches, a fire can be created, a light can be passed to a friend, and small spaces can be illuminated. This particular box was produced in an unknown underground factory in the roundabouts of the Zone, therefore high quality is not to be expected, though the price is not high, either. The box has been permanently crumpled, crumbling sulphur and broken wet matches. Only a quarter of its contents remains usable. Even so, lighting a fire or a cigarette is very difficult if using the matchbox - thus, stalkers tend to purchase a more expensive but practical lighter.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  usable for:  starting a fire, lighting a cigarette
en.st_bread_descr:
A fine bread loaf baked by Nimble's wife living outside the Zone. It was the first commodity Nimble started to sell before his business expanded. Nowadays, he provides barkeepers with this fine bread, acting as an intermediary. After all, he has more pressing matters to attend to as he has his own company to manage.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_breadold_descr:
Crumbs of bread baked in the Great Land.
 
 PROPERTIES:

  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_broken_detector_descr:
A broken Bear detector. The screen is smashed and the interior seems to be in quite a bad shape. Some of the electronic parts inside are still safe. They can be reused for repair purposes, or perhaps even in crafting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  broken beyond repair
