This PDA seems badly damaged, half the screen is broken and the GPS module doesn't work properly. The interior remained safe for the most part.
 
 PROPERTIES:

Caffeine and sodium benzoate which cause central nervous to work with highest effectiveness possible at a given time. Reduce sleepiness to a large degree. Take two tablets at one time.
 
 PROPERTIES:

  •  potent alcohol sobering effect

Playing cards is a popular pastime, but a deck of cards can also be used for sorting special trades. The cover depicts the proud architectural design of the Moscow Metro.

Cigarettes imported from the West. Someone must have smoked most of them since there are only a few left. Smoking just one may stabilise your mental state and satisfies hunger a bit. They are rare in the Zone and quite valuable.

en.st_cleaning_kit_p_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  9mm, .45 and .357 caliber weapons
 
 A set of specialized brushes which can be used to clean the barrel and other parts of a firearm from dirt, sand, moisture, lubricant residues and other foreign materials that have accumulated during use. Such sets are quite commonly used in the Zone in order to keep firearms in a good shape at all times. It is possible to utilize common tools to have a better access to inner mechanisms of a gun or alcohol to more easily dissolve oil residue. Can also be used to better spread gun oil, however a more cost-efficient method used by most experienced stalkers entails the application of animal fat on the brushes as an alternative lubricant. This particular set fits typical handgun calibers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_cleaning_kit_r5_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  5.45 and 5.56 caliber weapons
 
 A set of specialized brushes which can be used to clean the barrel and other parts of a firearm from dirt, sand, moisture, lubricant residues and other foreign materials that have accumulated during use. Such sets are quite commonly used in the Zone in order to keep firearms in a good shape at all times. It is possible to utilize common tools to have a better access to inner mechanisms of a gun or alcohol to more easily dissolve oil residue. Can also be used to better spread gun oil, however a more cost-efficient method used by most experienced stalkers entails the application of animal fat on the brushes as an alternative lubricant. This particular pack fits medium-caliber rifles with long barrels and comes in a hard plastic reusable container.
 
 PROPERTIES:

  •  usable for repairing equipment

This particular set fits large-caliber rifles and very long barrels. The set comprises a small portion of efficient lubricant and cleaning solvent as well as some light tools to facilitate access to inner mechanisms of a firearm. In order to maximize effectiveness, combine with additional materials or specialized repair sets.
 
 PROPERTIES:

  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_clearsky_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a sunrise against a clean blue sky, flanked by doves. It is meant to communicate the faction's desire to heal the Zone, as well as its distaste for conflict. Clear Sky has asserted an aim to gradually reduce the frequency and severity of blowouts and other anomalous cataclysms. Few stalkers believe such a thing will ever actually be possible. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_cocaine_descr:
Small aluminium case containing cocaine and the tools facilitating use. Cocaine is a powerfully addictive stimulant that drastically increases happiness, energy and alertness in the brain when taken, along with extreme irritability and paranoia leading to violent moodswings.
 
The long term effects include loss of appetite, disease vulnerability, psychosis and the erosion of mouth and lungs. For stalkers who expect to live an especially short or violent life regardless, the negatives are an acceptable tradeoff for the heigtened euphoria and combat performance granted by this drug's effects. Bandits are rumoured to be the biggest suppliers of cocaine in the Zone, with renegades being their primary customers.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 6%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  very potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_compass2_descr: This Сompass found even less often than the ordinary one. There are no negative effects on the body.
en.st_compression_bag_descr:
Holds a small sleeping bag or a small number of clothes
 
  PROPERTIES:
  •  use near unrolled sleeping bag to pack it up
  •  everyday item
en.st_conserva_descr:
The best before date at the back of the tin can indicates that you shouldn't expect delicacies.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_cooking_descr:
A field cooking travel kit. Contains cooking accessories and utensils for use when camping and travelling. Produces a lot of noise and is unwieldy due to its heavy weight. Very popular among larger groups of stalkers.
 
 NOTES:
 
 Although charcoal is available in the Zone at relatively cheap prices, you need to use a significant amount of it in order to prepare a single meal. For this reason, charcoal is not as cost effective as it would seem. On the other hand, it is relatively light, which makes it perfect for longer trips deep in the Zone.
 
 Mutant meats that do not require high temperature to be prepared are referred to as 'low-tier', whereas those that require high temperature - 'high-tier'.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  low-tier field cooking equipment
  •  fuel:  charcoal
  •  usable for cooking meats of lesser mutants
en.st_corn_descr:
Canned sweet corn imported from the outside. Can be eaten as it is, but there are some who use it as a soup ingredient.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_cortex_scope_desc:
PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: Russia
  •  Manufacturer: Various
  •  magnification: 1.0x - 12.0x
en.st_cuban_cigar_descr:
This valuable Cuban cigar can bring you bliss for a short while, especially when you're admiring a nice sunset. Some stalkers noticed that smoking strong tobacco repels mosquitoes. Cuban cigars are considered the finest in the world. A rare commodity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cutlery_descr:
A spoon, a knife and a fork made of heavy steel. A robust and reasonably light cutlery set, ideal for backpacking and field exploration. The cutlery is held together by a copper cord. If cleaned properly and derusted, it would be safe to use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_detector1_descr:
This dated anomalous activity detector produces an alarm signal when anomalous particles enter a special chamber as you approach an anomaly. It can also register the presence of artefacts and measure the distance to the nearest one. The distance is indicated by the frequency of the sound the detector emits. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. Due to its simple design, Echo can only be used to locate the most common artefacts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_detector2_descr:
This last generation anomalous activity detector can be used to locate anomalous formations and has a colour diode panel, which not only indicates the direction of artefacts, but also measures the distance to them. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. Unfortunately, the device is programmed with a somewhat outdated list of detectable artefacts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_detector3_descr:
A next generation scientific detection scanner. Thanks to three modernised detection chambers, the position of artefacts is shown on a special display screen. When closed, the device registers only radiation and anomalies. To switch to artefact search mode, open the front LED display. When in search mode, the detector is capable of locating all artefacts known to science.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high electric power consumption
en.st_detector4_descr:
A prototype of an expanded functionality anomalous frequency scanner. This device comes with a program used to identify static areas of anomalous activity stored in its database, while retaining the ability to locate artefacts. The position of anomalous areas and artefacts is displayed on a special screen. The artefact search mode, which can be activated by opening the front LED display, has been modified to detect anomalous formations currently unknown to science.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high electric power consumption
en.st_detector8_descr:
The first prototype has been designed in 2008 under Professor Sakharov's supervision in the mobile lab in Yantar. More copies has been made after proven success in study fields. This device is able to take and record measurements of anomalous fields. The improved framework and sensors guarantees operation even in hostile environments. High sensitivity during acquisition or while tracking allows for use in many different environments and under toughest operating conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_detector9_descr:
RF (Radio frequencies) receiver is a small device with a highly-sensitive RF module used for basic communications. Quite common among soldiers despite the old technology. As the name suggests, it has the ability to interact with radio signals in a radius of 200 m. The device is able to process radio waves with a frequency range between 30 and 300 MHz.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_device_flashlight_descr:
A general-purpose hand-held flashlight. Unfortunately, it cannot be used along most of the weaponry since it requires a free hand. Thus is can be simultaneously used only with pistols and other single-handed equipment.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_device_glowstick_blue_descr:
Generates light by causing a chemical reaction. Chemical light sources are widely used by stalkers as autonomous light sources in various emergency situations and other cases when there is no access to other lighting sources. Being completely self-sufficient, durable, fireproof, waterproof and suitable for long-term storage, their range of application is extremely wide. 
This variant emits a Cyan Light, while having a much lower range than average, it has the best illumination possible. Perfect for the Underground, or even in broad daylight for hard-to-see corners, be they in shadow or not.
 
PROPERTIES:
   technological item
   30 real-life minutes work time 
   Range: 6 metres

en.st_device_torch_descr:
A standard head-mounted flashlight in fully working order. Useful for stalkers who find themselves out and about after dark, but may attract trouble if used unwisely.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_device_torch_nv_1_descr:
A standard head-mounted flashlight in fully working order. Useful for stalkers who find themselves out and about after dark, but may attract trouble if used unwisely. This head lamp comes with a standard-issue 1PN93-1 Russian Military Forces night-vision device. Offers generation 2+ image intensification, especially useful for operations at night or in low-light conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  nightvision: 1PN93-1.
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_device_torch_nv_2_descr:
A standard head-mounted flashlight in fully working order. Useful for stalkers who find themselves out and about after dark, but may attract trouble if used unwisely. This head lamp comes with an IIT generation 2+ image intensification, intended for operation at night under natural illumination and in the complete darkness with the switched on infrared illuminator.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  nightvision: PN21KL.
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_device_torch_nv_3_descr:
A standard head-mounted flashlight in fully working order. Useful for stalkers who find themselves out and about after dark, but may attract trouble if used unwisely. This head lamp has an electric powerate of lenses and image-processing software that removes video noise and enhances image-intensifying capabilities of PN21K unit, thus making it a full-fledged IIT generation 3+ night vision device.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  nightvision: Oracle.
  •  moderate electric power consumption
en.st_device_torch_nv_4_descr:
Thermal background recognition device (thermal visor) equipped with a built-in flashlight. Allows to distinguish thermal signatures of warm objects, including people, animals, fire, anomalous fields, and more. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
   technological item
   high electric power consumption
en.st_dolg_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a gold crosshair set against a red and black shield. The design is meant to allude to the faction's military roots, but without detracting from their chief role as the stoic soldiers who resolutely contend the Zone's every move for the sake of the world outside.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_drink_crow_descr: "The Beak" is a powerful mixture of Zone-produced vodka and pulverised beak of a black crow. Not every beak can be used as an ingredient, because only black male crows that have lived in the Zone for more than 15 years have mutated sufficiently. The rumour has it that such beaks contain a form of enriched protein that cleanses moderate amounts of radiation from the body. Some even say that drinking "the Beak" makes you feel like you have wings for a few seconds. On the downside, however, the taste itself is awful.\n
en.st_drug_anabiotic_descr:
An experimental drug developed by Professor Ozersky for scientific research teams working in the Zone. At its core, the drug contains tetrodotoxin, known colloquially as "zombie powder," which causes a complete shutdown of the body's central nervous system that may allow people to survive emissions outside cover. After six years worth of field tests, thoughtful stalkers know to keep a few on hand for unexpected blowouts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  zone-produced
  •  causes temporary blackout
en.st_drug_antidot_descr:
The IP2 antitoxin is a complex drug comprising several antidotes, including metoclopramidum, pyridoxine, thiamine, riboxin and other pharmaceuticals. The drug is used to inject a range of antibiotics to neutralise natural poisons, together with synthetic poison absorbers, into the bloodstream. IP2 is not particularly popular in the Zone as most stalkers rely on a gas mask and a protective suit. However, there are still those who have a few units of this antidote stashed for emergency situations. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take one capsule at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  causes dizziness
en.st_drug_booster_descr:
The main component of this product is an anabolic androgen, an artificial steroid, the chemical composition of which resembles testosterone. Often used by stalkers during long raids to reduce muscle fatigue. Significantly increases weight-carrying capacity. The effects of the drug are long-lasting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  imported
  •  medicine
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_drug_coagulant_descr:
Ukrainian Vikasolum - an artificial equivalent of vitamin K. The main purpose of this drug is to increase blood coagulation speed. In great demand among stalkers who want slow-healing wounds and lacerations inflicted by mutants to close up faster. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  causes dizziness
en.st_drug_psy_blockade_descr:
A drug that blocks avalanche-like nerve impulses. Consumption induces short-term loss of all emotion. Used exclusively in the Zone to counteract the effects of anomalous psy-fields. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  causes extreme dizziness
en.st_drug_radioprotector_descr:
B190 Indraline radioprotectant, included in medkits issued to nuclear power plant personnel. Used in the Zone instead of the excessively toxic PC1 cysteamine hydrochloride, repeated use of which often caused death. Reduces the effects of gamma radiation on live tissue. Best consumed before exposure, as effects are not instant, but the drug lasts a long time. Take one capsule at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  mild dizziness
en.st_duct_tape_descr:
Duct tape is commonly used in situations that require a strong, flexible, and very sticky tape. An easy and temporary solution for quick repair jobs. This type also has a long-lasting adhesive and resistance to weathering.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_e_syringe_descr:
A 12mL medical syringe with a lousy plunger. Seems like it has been used quite frequently. With a drug-making kit and proper knowledge, this syringe can come in handy for the creation of various types of drugs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  basic material
  •  everyday item
en.st_ecolog_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a pair of golden wings set against a white and cyan background. The Zone's black market highly values Ecologist patches, as sewing one convincingly into a suit can allow a stalker to go almost anywhere without fear of molestation by other groups. Ecologists seldom part with their patches willingly, although that doesn't stop the Zone's less scrupulous denizens.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_ecologist_outfit_blue_description: High quality modified SSP-99 suit. It provides increased body protection from bullet and splinter damage. It is designed for the guards working with scientific expeditions. The Sapphire model provides excellent protection against psi exposure. It provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments and other effects dangerous to the body.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_grn_description: High quality modified SSP-99 suit. It provides increased body protection from bullet and splinter damage. It is designed for the guards working with scientific expeditions. It provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments and other effects dangerous to the body.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_orange_description: A SSP-99 chemical protection suit specially designed for the Zone conditions. It is used by scientific expeditions and the eco-stalkers who cooperate with them. It has an integrated air-filtering and air-conditioning system. It is heat and electricity resistant, provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments. It is not designed for combat, so it provides neither bullet, nor splinter protection.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_red_description: High quality modified SSP-99 suit. It provides increased body protection from bullet and splinter damage. It is designed for the guards working with scientific expeditions. The ‘Ruby’ model gives excellent protection against mutant attacks, as well as a wound healing system integrated in the suit. It provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments and other effects dangerous to the body.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_white_description: A SSP-99 chemical protection suit specially designed for the Zone’s harsh conditions. It is used by scientific expeditions and the eco-stalkers who cooperate with them. It has an integrated air-filtering and air-conditioning system, thus providing excellent protection from radiation. The Diamond variant gives superior protection from electricity. Also has an integrated system for suppressing anomalies’ activity, which provides an average protection against chemicals and high temperatures. It is not designed to conduct military operations, therefore it doesn’t provide any protection from bullets or from shrapnel.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_yello_description: A SSP-99 chemical protection suit specially designed for the Zone conditions. It is used by scientific expeditions and the eco-stalkers who cooperate with them. The Topaz model provides excellent protection against radiation. It has an integrated air-filtering and air-conditioning system. It is heat and electricity resistant, provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments. It is not designed for combat, so it provides neither bullet, nor splinter protection.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_report_1_of_3_desc:
A machine-typed document stamped with the Ecologist research team emblem. Classified as strictly confidential and signed by: Arkady Cvetkovsky.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  scientific item
  •  personal belongings
en.st_ecologist_report_1_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings field report 39B rev. 2 (part 1 of 3)

en.st_ecologist_report_3_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings field report 39B rev. 2 (part 3 of 3)
en.st_energy_descr: Stored energy is given in ampere-hours (Ah).
en.st_energy_drink_descr:
Often used by stalkers on long trips due to its exhilarating effect when you're tired. The drink also sobers you up a bit if you're drunk as well as induces the release of adrenaline into the bloodstream. Do not overdose.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  imported
  •  stimulant
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_equ_milpack_desc:
A combat backpack used by the military, often to store additional munitions and medical supplies.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  item storage
  •  usable as stash
en.st_equ_smallpack_desc:
A backpack with considerable storage space. The inside has been modified to keep water out. Not a pretty solution, but it works. A popular choice among stalkers and rookies.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  item storage
  •  usable as stash
en.st_equ_smilpack_desc:
A large backpack for long journeys. Thanks to the weight distribution system, it allows the wearer to carry enough supplies and equipment for a trip lasting up to five days.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  item storage
  •  usable as stash
en.st_equ_touristpack_desc:
A tourist's backpack with a lot of storage space. Not very popular owing to its cumbersome size.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  item storage
  •  usable as stash
en.st_exo_repair_kit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  any exoskeleton
 
 This complex and heavy set includes everything necessary - from ultra-durable threads and needles to polymer-based patches - to conduct a complete repair of any hi-tech armor. Can be used regardless of materials involved, be it heavy cloth or military-grade kevlar sheets. Additional tools and kits increase effectiveness of repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_exolight_repair_kit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  heavy armours
 
 This complex and heavy set includes everything necessary - from ultra-durable threads and needles to polymer-based patches - to conduct a complete repair of any heavy armor. Can be used regardless of materials involved, be it heavy cloth or military-grade kevlar sheets. Additional tools and kits increase effectiveness of repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
en.st_fieldcooker_descr:
The stove has been tested extensively over many years and has been used on countless expeditions. It is extremely robust, reliable and powerful and was designed to handle demanding situations, extreme altitudes and both low and high temperatures. It has a very high output and can be used with virtually any kind of fuel, including butane, gasoline / petrol, diesel, kerosene / paraffin, and even aviation fuel. Using the separate control knob, you can adjust the flame to the heat you want, even if you are wearing gloves.
 
 NOTES:
 
 Since fuels used in the multi-fuel stove are much more efficient energy-carriers than the wood or coal, the multi-fuel stove is - in the long run - significantly more cost-effective than traditional wood or coal stoves. On the other hand, these fuels are usually carried in heavy metal containers, which makes them more suited for use at bases, rather than in field operations.
 
 Mutant meats that do not require high temperature to be prepared are referred to as 'low-tier', whereas those that require high temperature - 'high-tier'.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  high-tier cooking equipment
  •  fuel:  gasoline, natural gas, kerosene
  •  usable for cooking meats of all mutants
en.st_flashlight_broken_descr:
The handle is broken and even duct tape wouldn't be able to keep the batteries in place. This is no longer of any value.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  broken beyond repair
  •  unusable
en.st_flask_descr:
Military flasks are intended for storing small amounts of water. Prepared by medics and scientists. First, the water - combined with a special type of alcohol - is boiled at a very high temperature for purification and disinfection. Afterwards, it is cooled in refrigerators, to which it owes its refreshing "spark." The end result is water that is completely radiation-free. If in spite of the above, you still have doubts concerning its purity, you can always use akvatab. Due to the cost of production, military flasks are in a limited supply and are sold at a moderate price. Medics also have them in stock, but they're slightly more expensive as they include the cost of transportation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_freedom_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a green wolf set against a black background alongside the Ukrainian flag. Overall, the design is meant to communicate Freedom's social nature and love of the land alongside their staunch determination and collective predatory viciousness in battle. Why anarchists would want any country's flag as part of their design, however, is a mystery.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_freedom_manual_1_of_2_desc:
An instructional leaflet with a large Freedom emblem at the upper right corner and a simple drawing of a hand-gun pointing at a kneeling human figure. It is titled "Interrogation techniques: The basics" and is written in a typical, laid-back slang of the faction.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_fuel_tier_1_desc:
•  Campfire
  •  Charcoal
  •  Kerosene
  •  Jerrycan
  •  Gas balloon
en.st_gas_tube_10: Ejector from an over-under double barrel shotgun [R]
en.st_gas_tube_10_descr: Ejector from an over-under double barrel shotgun.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_11_descr: Gas tube from the MP5 submachine gun with a handle.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_1_descr: Gas tube from a smoothbore carbine.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_2_descr: mobile hand guard from pump-action shotgun.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_3_descr: Gas tube from a self-loading rifle.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_4_descr: Gas tube from a special automatic rifle. 9mm.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_5_descr: Gas tube from a semi-automatic or automatic rifle (Russia).\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_6_descr: Gas tube from a semi-automatic or automatic rifle (NATO).\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_7_descr: Gas tube from a machine gun.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_8_descr: Ejector from a rifle with a sliding bolt carrier with locking bolt.\n \n
en.st_gas_tube_9_descr: Ejector (extractor) from an over-under double barrel shotgun.\n \n
en.st_geiger_dead_descr:
A Geiger counter measures ionising (radioactive) radiation. It detects the emission of alpha particles, beta particles and gamma particles. Invented in 1908, Geiger counters remain popular technological object used for measurements in health, physics, industry, geology and other fields of activity. Made of simple electronic circuits.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological device 
  •  measures the level of radioactive contamination
  •  moderate electric power consumption
  •  operates in 3 modes
en.st_gloves_descr:
A pair of leather gloves. Feel and smell good as if they are bought recently. When the weather gets cold, it's important to keep your hands warm and ready.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  valuable
en.st_glucose_descr:
Glucose shots are used in cases of severe diabetic hypoglycaemia, but can also be employed as a stimulant. Instant induction of carbohydrates entails a rapid boost of energy, thus allowing the user to undertake increased physical effort and withstand stress. Due to its convenient means of administration, they can be used in combat situations. This makes glucose shot a very good way to speed-up the healing process.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_glucose_s_descr:
Glucose shots are used in cases of severe diabetic hypoglycaemia, but can also be employed as a stimulant. Instant induction of carbohydrates entails a rapid boost of energy, thus allowing the user to undertake increased physical effort and withstand stress. Due to its convenient means of administration, they can be used in combat situations. This makes glucose shot a very good way to speed-up the healing process.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_glue_a_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and headgear sets
 
 Advanced glue produced by the Ukrainian chemical industry, modified epoxy-based adhesive "Tur" is able to quickly bind most solid materials. Versatility and ease of use are the two reasons why "Tur" is kept in such a high regard among stalkers, especially since spare materials are scarce. The glue binds both textile fabrics and lighter protective materials like kevlar, but is useless when it comes to metals.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_glue_b_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and light headgear sets
 
 Cheapest of the synthetic adhesives available in the Zone, this epoxy-based solution may be used to put together slightly torn pieces of fabric or to patch up a small hole in your helmet, but it will be useless in case of any serious damage. On the other hand, "Zviezda" has a great value for price, and if used on a regular basis it's able to keep your outfit in a good shape at all times. It is advised to use any type of commonly found materials to greatly increase effectiveness of repair. The glue, however, won't support mutant skins. Can also be used to facilitate sewing.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_glue_e_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and headgear sets
 
 M17 is a result of a Soviet military-industrial research project intended to devise an extremely potent, single-ingredient adhesive which could be used in any situation regardless of purpose and materials involved. It was decided to use a highly potent methacrylate which is most often optimized for reacting with either plastic or metal. In case of M17, however, this limitation has been bypassed, making the substance equally effective in both areas. In addition, the adhesive received a significant boost to versatility thanks to its hydrate form: it can be diluted with water and used in any concentration depending on the intended result. There is almost no damage that the glue, combined with appropriate materials, won't be able to repair. Can be used with all materials available in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_grease_descr:
Grease is a semi-solid lubricant. It generally consists of a soap emulsified with mineral or vegetable oil. Greases are applied to mechanisms that cannot be lubricated constantly or where typical lubricating oil would not stay in position. They also act as sealants to prevent ingress of water and incompressible materials. Grease-lubricated bearings have greater frictional characteristics due to their high viscosity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
en.st_greh_fp_descr:
Merely holding this patch makes you feel slightly uneasy. In the top left corner is a serpent, while in the right there's an Eastern Orthodox Cross. Against the center of the badge sits a stylized image of an eclipse. As you continue to carry this emblem, however, your unease subsides into a strange and gradual sense of peace.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_grenade_f1_descr:
A defensive hand grenade, with fragments capable of piercing medium level body armour. The grenade has an approximately 4 metre kill radius. Stalkers get F1 grenades from trading with the military, who write them off as having been used for fighting mutants.
 
  •  Blast power: high
  •  Blast radius: 4.2 m
  •  Fragments' radius: 48 m
  •  Av. number of fragments: 380 (small shrapnels)
  •  Explosion delay: ~4 seconds
en.st_grenade_launcher_descr:
A single shot, front loaded, rifled underbarrel grenade launcher for assault rifles made in Warsaw Pact countries. Designed to greatly expand fire-power of a basic infantry squad. The firing mechanism is self-cocking, with a manual safety catch and automatic shot prevention if incorrectly installed onto a rifle.
 
  •  muzzle velocity: ~76 m / sec
  •  fire range: ~300 m
  •  reload time: slow
  •  ammunition: VOG-25 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_l85_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  L85
 
 The M320 under-barrel grenade launcher developed by Heckler & Koch in 2008 to replace the M203 grenade launcher.
  •  ammunition: M203 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_m203_descr:
A modified M203 grenade launcher whose length has been decreased by three inches, and which can be attached to weapons by means of a Picatinny rail. Thanks to a changed mount, this grenade launcher is widely used around the world and can be installed on most currently produced rifles. Although of more modern design, it has almost the same properties as its Soviet counterpart - the GP-25 grenade launcher.
 
  •  muzzle velocity: ~76 m / sec
  •  fire range: ~300 m
  •  reload time: slow
  •  ammunition: M203 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_monolit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  AK-12 Monolith with Tactical Kit installed on it.
 
 30mm light grenade launcher, developed by the designers of the Monolithh faction, based on the special silent 6G17 Canaryka grenade launcher.
  •  ammunition: VOG-30 30mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_scar_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  FN SCAR
 
 40mm grenade launcher developed by the Belgian company FN Herstal for the FN SCAR assault rifle
  •  ammunition: M203 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_rgd5_descr:
An offensive hand grenade with a small kill zone of about 3 metres. Often used by stalkers to "smoke out" mutants due to its relatively low cost.
 
  •  Blast power: medium
  •  Blast radius: 3,2 m
  •  Fragments' radius: 43 m
  •  Av. number of fragments: 240 (small shrapnels)
  •  Explosion delay: ~4 seconds
en.st_grenade_smoke_descr: A hand smoke grenade. Used to put up smoke screens. Once the grenade is thrown it takes 10 seconds for the smoke screen to expand.
en.st_grenade_thermite_descr:
An incendiary grenade (or thermite grenade) that produces intense heat (2,200 °C or 3,992 °F) by means of a chemical reaction in which powdered aluminium and iron oxide react to produce a stream of molten iron and aluminium oxide. Filled with 600 to 800 grams of thermite.
 
  •  Blast power: medium (thermal damage)
  •  Blast radius: 4.6 m
  •  Fragments' radius: none
  •  Av. number of fragments: none
  •  Explosion delay: ~4 seconds
en.st_grooming_descr:
Grooming kit that packs a ballistic nylon travel case with a beard and moustache comb and detail facial scissors, featuring man-sized finger rings, ultra-sharp cutting blades of stainless steel, non-slip rubberised grip, and a precision trimming tip.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  disassembling tool
en.st_guitar_descr:
Guitar is a string instrument widely used by stalkers of all factions throughout the Zone in order to raise spirits and fraternize. Stalkers can often be seen playing the guitar in camps, outposts or other places of relative safety - usually by the fire. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_gun_oil_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  suited for all weapons
 
 Spray can containing oil intended for lubricating and protecting firearms. Frequent application will prevent guns from malfunctioning and corroding, especially after prolonged use in combat situations. Prior to lubrication process, it is advisable to properly clean the firearm to remove any foreign material that has accumulated on or inside it. One can also make use of basic tools in order to access the inner parts of a gun so as to maximize the effectiveness of maintenance. A special tuboline increases gliding quality of all movable parts making the oil even better suited for repeaters and automatic weapons. This allows guns to function even at temperatures of up to -55 °C. It has a flash point of 78 °C.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  fast usage (spray lubricant)
  •  high quality
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_gun_oil_ru_d_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  suited for all weapons
 
 Iconic Red Army oil that has been in service for almost 70 years. The metal bottle is divided into two separate compartments, one for oil and the other one for the cleaning solvent. In the beginning, the solvent was based on an alkaline solution for effective clean-up of preservation salts in which ammunition was commonly shipped and stored. Since then, the composition of liquids has been modernized many times, but the simple yet ingenious 'double' bottle design remained unchanged. "Dvojka" is very popular in the Exclusion Zone due to its versatility. Bear in mind, however, that the oil requires adequate tools to be spread properly and so that it can reach deep into weapon's inner mechanisms. "Dvojka" should thus be regarded as more of an add-on than a stand-alone maintenance item.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  liquid gun oil and cleaning solvent
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_gun_oil_ru_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  suited for all weapons
 
 Plastic bottle containing a budget Russian mineral gun oil. Despite its low price, it can prove useful in keeping a firearm in a good condition if applied frequently. It should be used alongside brushes for increased effect. According to the manufacturer, "Rusak" is especially effective for automatic and repeatable weapons due to low friction coefficient. It also contains various anti-corrosion and metal-preserving additives.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  liquid gun oil
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_hand_rolling_tobacco_descr:
Precious hand-rolling tobacco, imported from the West. With no additional ingredients, so it's possible to enjoy the original taste of tobacco leaf itself.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  slow usage (roll up)
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  high quality
en.st_hand_watch_descr:
An old, classic Soviet "raketa3" watch. Looks like it's still in a good shape. It's not surprising that many stalkers prefer mechanical watches over PDAs for usual time checking. Giving the fact that those watches are reliable and durable even at the worst situations, they come in handy where PDAs fail due to strong electromagnetic waves coming from emissions or nearby anomaly fields. However, some simply wear them as a style accessory.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
en.st_harmonica_descr:
For blues and prison romance lovers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_hb_isg_dushman_intel_desc: If Dushman has kept his word, this case contains drawn up maps and notes that'll be invaluable to UNISG. Should drastically reduce the risk that future UNISG missions will entail.
en.st_headlamp_descr:
Although few dare to explore the Zone during the night, there are circumstances where a head lamp is crucial. And another source of light won't hurt, because you never know when you'll have to move from place to place. Unfortunately, this particular unit has long seen its working days and can now only serve as a source of cheap spare parts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  broken beyond repair
  •  unusable
en.st_heavy_sewing_thread_descr:
An advanced toolkit for sewing and sealing retardants. Including kevlar thread, one of the strongest and most heat resistant commercially available threads. It is about 2.5 times stronger than nylon and polyester, has very little stretch, does not melt, and decomposes at 800F. This makes it a great choice for high stress applications including sewing seams on heavy duty clothing.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  toolkit
  •  high quality
  •  usable for outfit parts maintenance
en.st_helm_bandana_descr: An ordinary fabric bandana worn by conscripts, support corps and rear-echelon troops in the Military. Normally worn on the head, soldiers will often drape it around their mouth and nose instead to avoid breathing in toxic or radioactive particles. While better than nothing, this obviously isn't very effective, and bandanas used this way need frequent replacement.\n \n
en.st_helm_battle_descr: An aluminium/titanium helmet with a cloth exterior for camouflage. Comes with pockets that can be filled with additional armour pieces. This helmet is in common use among Military Stalkers and Spetsnaz, who typically use it in tandem with PSZ-series body armour. Overall, the M12 Sphere Helmet provides some of the best combat-oriented protection in the Zone, and is in demand among any wealthy stalker who expects to get caught in a serious battle.\n \n
en.st_helm_cloth_mask_descr: A simple piece of cloth, folded into a mask. It is often used by stalkers to prevent dangerous particles from entering the body, as a precautionary measure. However, with prolonged use, it can accumulate toxins, so it is always desirable to have a spare for a quick replacement.\n \n
en.st_helm_exo_descr: This helmet resembles that of an ordinary exoskeleton, but differs slightly from its standard counterpart and has differing protective characteristics. Good protection from gunfire and high calibre rounds in combination with anomaly protection make this helmet one of the best in its category.\n \n
en.st_helm_hardhat_descr: A desperately outdated steel army helmet with a retractable visor for the eyes and not much else. Provides negligible protection against anomalies or radiation, but can deflect bullets. This helmet was never particularly popular in the Zone, except for use in brief armed conflicts between factions.\n \n
en.st_helm_m40_descr: This M40 is equipped with a multilayered 40-millimetre breathing filter placed on the left. This mask provides respectable radiation and chemical protection for extended periods, even after suffering damage. This gas mask is mass-produced for the US Armed Forces, and finds great use among Mercenaries.\n \n
en.st_helm_metro_descr: Believed to have first been created by a faction known as "Final Day", this helm resembles a Czech M10 Gas Mask with heavy armour plating modifications. While it is uncomfortably heavy for most, it still boasts good protective characteristics versus chemical, radioactive and physical threats. When Final Day's leaders were assassinated and the faction dissolved by a stalker named Ghost, these helmets gradually entered into circulation among well-heeled stalkers, particularly those who intended to raid the myriad underground labs across the Zone.\n \n
en.st_helm_protective_descr: An uncomfortable but high quality curtain helmet made by the same Defense Research Institute as the SEVA bodysuit. Has a hermetic design, and allows for complete isolation from the conditions of an anomalous environment. It is intended to be used in tandem with military suits for the purpose of operations in highly anomalous areas.\n \n
en.st_helm_resp_descr: A basic plastic and rubber respirator, used to protect the wearer from inhaling harmful dusts, fumes, vapours or gases. Widely used by rookies and even some veterans from all factions due to its light weight and economical environmental protection. However, it provides negligible physical protection and is practically guaranteed to fail in more heavily irradiated areas.\n \n
en.st_helm_respirator_descr: A ShMB gas mask refitted with external 40mm filters for greater functionality. Because the process of conversion from the old internal "porkchop" filters was never standardized, however, there is some slight variance in weight and radiological protection between individual masks. As a general rule, masks like this offer respectable protection in areas of increased radioactive activity, but suffer from a high failure rate in toxic environments and have negligible protection against physical impacts, rapidly breaking when placed under such conditions.\n \n
en.st_helm_respirator_gp5_descr: Originally manufactured from 1962 to 1989, the GP-5 gas mask was built with the intention to protect the Soviet people from radioactive fallout. It is a helmet-mask made of white and black rubber, with the lenses held in place by a crimping rim. The filters, however, have been restored or replaced with a great deal of care. Compared to gas mask kits of similar price and availability, such as the PBF, this reconditioned respiratory device boasts greater protection against radiation, but an even greater failure rate in toxic environments. \n \n
en.st_helm_rp_bala_descr: A regular black fabric balaclava. It'll help keep your face warm in Eastern Europe's frigid winters, if nothing else. While the cloth of the mask does help filter some toxic and radioactive particles from the air you breathe, this protection is unreliable at best, and balaclavas used this way will soon need to be replaced.\n \n
en.st_helm_tactic_descr: A modern, high quality helmet with a built-in air filtration system, with features based on Western models. The design consists of several layers of Kevlar to protect the wearer from severe physical harm. The helmet is also made of composite dielectric materials, thereby granting the wearer greater insulation from shock than most similar models. Most commonly used by the Zone's Spetsnaz operators, especially in conjunction with the PS5 body armour series.\n \n
en.st_helmet_repair_kit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  medium and heavy headgear sets
 
 This kit contains everything that is needed to perform effective repair of modern combat helmets. It features heavy tools that will allow you to work on hard materials such as kevlar, steel or titanium, as well as a very strong, methacrylate-based adhesive. As the kit does not contain any sewing equipment, it cannot be effectively utilized for reparation of flexible materials of armors, but it can be used to disassemble headgear sets to greatly improve the effectiveness of repair.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_hide_bloodsucker_descr:
Bloodsuckers as a species evolved from humans and this affinity can still be seen in the texture of their skin. What is most characteristic, the skin is very soft and pleasant in touch, almost like the skin of a child. This applies, however, only to the outer layer - underneath, bloodsuckers boast well-developed muscles which can be utilised to form a coat of sorts with considerable damage reducing potential, especially in regard to melee attacks. This makes bloodsucker skin a popular choice among experienced hunters who also wear it as a sign of their proficiency. The most unique property and at the same time the main drawback of the skin is its very intense reaction to temperature change - although the tissue itself will only burn in very high temperatures, it can get very hot making it increasingly damaging to wearer and equipment underneath it.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medium mutant pelt
  •  valuable
en.st_hide_boar_descr:
A hide almost fully covered with a thick layer of fur, removed from one of wild boars found commonly in the Zone. The mutants themselves are quite resistant to damage and can take considerable punishment, and the reason for this is simple: big muscle mass and almost unbreakable bones. The skin, on the other hand, is quite thin (most probably to provide the creature with effective means of thermal regulation), making it a rather poor choice for armour enhancement. The fur in turn makes the hide a relatively potent thermal insulator. Can also be used for light repairs. Unfortunately, wearing the pelt on top of the armour makes the user less resistant to radioactive and toxic damage as heavy particles often accumulate within the fur.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  light mutant pelt
en.st_hide_burer_descr:
Skinning a burer is a lot like skinning a twisted dwarf. Add to it an almost unbearable stench of bad eggs and you get the idea why stalkers consider this quite a feat. Reports indicate that whereas the skin offers relatively low physical protection it can be used to absorb and disperse significant amounts of incoming psy waves when worn over the head. Burer's skin has low electrical resistance, thus the wearer is more susceptible to electrical damage. Furthermore, due to the fact that burers are relatively rarely encountered in the Zone, the skin has significant research potential, making it a valuable trading commodity for the scientists.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  light mutant pelt
  •  rare scientific specimen
  •  valuable
  •  effectiveness of mult. units is stackable
en.st_hide_chimera_descr:
Chimera, being one of the most dangerous mutants in the Zone, is not only a significant threat, but can also be regarded as a viable source of wealth. All parts that can be taken from chimera's corpse can be sold for a large amount of money, but it is the skin that is one of the most valued scientific specimens as well as one of the best armour enhancements available in the Exclusion Zone. It offers very good protection properties and, even more importantly, is relatively light-weight thanks to which it does not limit mobility. However, its most unique feature is that organic fibres found in the skin act as very effective electrical conductors. This fact to a large degree confirms reports of recon units (especially those scouting around the AMK Industrial Complex) concerning sightings of chimeras surrounded in what looked like an electrical anomaly, producing discharges on contact with any hostile living organism. Unfortunately, no unit was able to make it back, so there is no evidence confirming the existence of such a creature.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  heavy mutant pelt
  •  very rare scientific specimen
  •  extremely valuable
  •  effectiveness of mult. units is stackable
en.st_hide_controller_descr:
As is the case with other humanoid mutants, it's quite an emotional challenge to scalp a controller and it proves to be even more difficult as the face of a controller retains certain characteristics of the person it once was. Confidential sources within the military also revealed that fingerprints of the person who turned into a controller can sometimes be found in the database. Recent analysis shows that not only the hand of the controller is capable of producing psy waves - the whole body is the source of emissions. For this reason, the scalp - when prepared properly - has the ability to absorb and filter psy energy, but for this effect to take place it is necessary to cover your head with multiple scalps. The skin is also electrically conductive. As regards its physical properties, it is light and can only be used for minor outfit repairs. As is the case with all humanoid psy creatures, the skin of a controller is electrically conductive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  light mutant pelt
  •  rare scientific specimen
  •  very valuable
  •  effectiveness of mult. units is stackable
en.st_hide_flesh_descr:
Hide removed from a breed of mutated pigs commonly referred to as fleshes. Its heavy weight (its main drawback) results from a thick layer of fat underneath the relatively soft and shallow skin. It offers low physical protection, but on the other hand considerably reduces the harmful effects of chemical, thermal and electrical anomalies. Can be used only for minor repairs as the layer of fat is useless for the purposes of armour maintenance and must be cut off, leaving only a small patch of shallow skin tissue.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  light mutant pelt
 •  damage prot. negligible
en.st_hide_lurker_descr:
A thick hide almost fully covered with a layer of fur, removed from a lurker. The mutants themselves are quite resistant to damage and can take considerable punishment, and the reason for this is simple: big muscle mass and almost unbreakable bones. The skin of lurker is known for being thick and durable, making it a good choice for armour enhancement. The fur in turn makes the hide a relatively potent thermal insulator. Can also be used for light repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  light mutant pelt
en.st_hide_pseudodog_descr:
Densely covered with short and stiff fur, the pelt of pseudodog remains one of the most useful, widespread and versatile mutant pelts available in the Zone. It can be easily attached to armour with even lightest of tools, and yet it's quite durable, which makes it suitable for medium-grade outfit repairs. When used as a whole - it can cover significant area of the body with protective layer which increases resistance to both physical damage and heat. The fur also provides effective insulation. However, as is the case with all such pelts, it easily catches radioactive and toxic particles, so it is highly advised to remove it when in radioactive or toxic areas.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medium mutant pelt
  •  effectiveness of mult. units is stackable
en.st_hide_pseudogiant_descr:
The skin of a pseudogiant in many ways resembles the skin of an elephant. It's thick and hard in touch, its texture is very irregular and full of folds which act as the creature's cooling mechanism. The average thickness of pseudogiant's skin is around 2 cm, which makes it very durable and capable of withstanding significant damage. This is, however, at the cost of increased weight. Since pseudogiants are known to often live in areas of high toxicity and radioactivity, the hide naturally adapted to such conditions, which further increases its usefulness. It can also be used to patch even the heaviest of outfits but this process requires the most durable and expensive tools available. It is valued not only for its practical qualities, but can also serve as a prestigious hunting trophy and a rare specimen for the scientists in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  very heavy mutant pelt
  •  scientific specimen
  •  valuable
  •  effectiveness of mult. units is stackable
en.st_hide_psy_dog_descr:
The fur of a psy dog is undoubtedly one of the most beautiful and rare clothing materials in the world. Usually snow white or grey, it is in great demand and can be sold for a hefty sum of money. It's probably made its way into fashion industry thanks to smugglers some of whom have recently turned to hunting mutants. For those in the Zone, it can serve as a blanket, especially during cold nights, and offers efficient rupture protection and mild psy influence reduction when head part of the fur is used as a mask or a hood. However, it easily catches radioactive and toxic particles, so it is highly advised to remove it when in radioactive or toxic areas. Hunters wear it with pride, but only if the creature was slain by their own hands.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medium mutant pelt
  •  valuable
  •  effectiveness of mult. units is stackable
en.st_hide_psysucker_descr:
Psysuckers as a species evolved from bloodsuckers and this affinity can still be seen in the texture of their skin. What is most characteristic, the skin is very soft and pleasant in touch, almost like the skin of a child. This applies, however, only to the outer layer - underneath, Psysuckers boast well-developed muscles which can be utilised to form a coat of sorts with considerable damage reducing potential, especially in regard to melee attacks. This makes Psysucker skin a popular choice among experienced hunters who also wear it as a sign of their proficiency. The most unique property and at the same time the main drawback of the skin is its very intense reaction to temperature change - although the tissue itself will only burn in very high temperatures, it can get very hot making it increasingly damaging to wearer and equipment underneath it. Reports indicate that whereas the skin offers relatively low physical protection it can be used to absorb and disperse significant amounts of incoming psy waves when worn over the head.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medium mutant pelt
  •  valuable
en.st_hideout_cat_bed_descr:
A comfy bed for your cat. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Placeable
en.st_hideout_cat_descr:
A half-tamed cat that somehow found it's way into the Zone. Sleeps through emissions, purrs like an anomaly, and reminds stalkers what “home” almost feels like. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  Placeable
en.st_ied_descr:
Improvised explosive device produced from various chemical substances, with a broken electrical igniter and in steel ball container. Chemicals used in the device produce intense odour and are heavily toxic. This IED is significantly more powerful than a more common OG-7V version. In the Zone, IEDs are quite popular and Zoners use them for a variety of purposes, from gaining access to closed areas to ambushes. They are also often placed next to mines to greatly amplify the explosion's power. IED can be effectively concealed making it virtually invisible to everyone else.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  military item
  •  unnoticeable when placed on ground
  •  triggering mechanism: proximity
  •  blast power: very high
  •  blast radius: 12.9 m
  •  fragments radius: 74 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 580 (steel balls)
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_ied_rpg: Improvised explosive device (based on OG-7V warhead)
en.st_ied_rpg_descr:
Improvised explosive device based on OG-7V warhead and parts of a car battery. It looks like it has been carried around for quite some time and could go off any second. Fortunately, the triggering mechanism ensures that it won't unless the explosive is directly hit by a bullet or subjected to other potent physical force. In the Zone, IEDs are quite popular and Zoners use them for a variety of purposes, from gaining access to closed areas to ambushes. They are also often placed next to mines to greatly amplify the power of explosion. IED can be effectively concealed making it virtually invisible to everyone else.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  military item
  •  unnoticeable when placed on ground
  •  triggering mechanism: proximity
  •  blast power: high
  •  blast radius: 7.8 m
  •  fragments' radius: 56 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 440 (shrapnel)
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_isg_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a white microscope girded by highly angular, stylized laurels set against a maroon background. Sewn onto the back of the patch is a label stating that the badge belongs to the United Nations International Scientific Group.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_itm_actor_backpack_desc_mlr: Often used by stalkers as a fallback in case of unforeseen circumstances. Its features are simple, consisting of a strap which can be dropped along with the backpack at any moment, in order to run away quickly. Quite compact and capacious. Practically, it allows you to reset your backpack along with some content.
en.st_itm_actor_backpack_descr:
Being caught by surprise in the Zone is one of the worst things that can happen to you. Although the QR-system does not help you prevent such situations, it certainly helps with getting out of danger. Its function is simple: it almost immediately removes the straps from your backpack and lets you escape to a safe place without the heavy backpack hampering your movement. To use it, set it as a hotkey item. Push the hotkey to activate the emergency release that instantly drops your backpack (and everything inside it) to the ground. Your equipped weapon(s), ammunition, armour and armour attachments as well as UPD remain in your possession, so you are ready to fight. You can retrieve your backpack afterwards.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  build in GPS
  •  very fast usage (release clamp)
  •  combat gear remains with user
en.st_itm_advancedkit_descr:
A decent set of old tools, but despite their age they appear to be in good condition. Contains a handful set of small pliers, tipped tweezers, probe and pick set. With enough knowledge and experience, this kit can be used for the creation of better equipment.
 
 NOTES:
  •  A technician could use these to fully modify weapons and armour.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  usable on mechanic's workshop for crafting
  •  valuable
  •  requires suitable materials
en.st_itm_ammokit_descr:
A decent set of old gunsmithing tools and accessories. Contains a pin punch set, wheeler hammer, press tool and a black powder measure kit. With enough knowledge and experience, this kit can be used for recycling damaged ammunition and the creation of better variants.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  usable on mechanic's workshop for crafting
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  requires suitable materials
en.st_itm_backpack_desc:
A backpack made of durable material able to withstand the harshest weather conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  item storage
  •  usable as stash
en.st_itm_basickit_descr:
A basic repair toolkit. Unlikely to be suitable for advanced maintenance, but they could be useful in the hands of a thrifty technician. Contains different types and sizes of pliers, screws, adhesives and assorted fasteners. With enough knowledge and experience, this kit can be used for the creation of basic equipment.
 
 NOTES:
  •  A technician could use these to fully modify weapons and armour.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  usable on mechanic's workshop for crafting
  •  valuable
  •  requires suitable materials
en.st_itm_drugkit_descr:
Small cases and various metal objects constitute a kit for managing and producing drugs. Contains some plastic packages, tablets and ampoules.
 
 NOTES:
  •  A medic could use these in making drugs and medicine.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  usable on mechanic's workshop for crafting
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  requires suitable materials
en.st_itm_expertkit_descr:
A professional set of high quality tools for fine-tuning equipment. Contains drill bit set, precision tweezers, soldiering iron, 4 mm Screwdriver bits and a multimeter. With enough knowledge and experience, this kit can be used for the creation of advanced equipment.
 
 NOTES:
  •  A technician could use these to fully modify weapons and armour.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  usable on mechanic's workshop for crafting
  •  valuable
  •  requires suitable materials
en.st_itm_mapkit_descr:
An untitled document that contains some hand-written sheets of paper, personal pictures and few worn paragraphs. Nothing really special except for one big printed map with some marked locations. Apparently the owner was an artefact hunter.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  informative
en.st_itm_sleepbag_descr:
A light sleeping bag that will keep you warm and dry when you need to rest. Be sure to pick a safe spot with a possible escape route. The bag is automatically picked up after sleeping or if hit "cancel" button.
 
 WARNING:
 
 Sleeping in the open may attract predators. Does not protect from radiation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  sets up portable bed
  •  infinite usages
  •  everyday item
en.st_itm_tent_bag_descr:
A bag, intended for the storage and transportation of a camping tent. Disassembly and packing takes some time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  used for packing a tent
  •  unlimited usages
en.st_itm_tent_descr:
A bag containing a tent for camping, sheltering from rain and wind. Assembly and installation takes some time. In the Zone, it is best deployed in a place with escape routes in case of danger.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  used for deploying tent
  •  unlimited usages
en.st_jar_descr:
A tiny plastic jar. Such jars are always handy for keeping small items safe, especially drugs and medicine. It protects the contents from moisture and ensures the moisture content of the product remains the same.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  basic material
  •  everyday item
en.st_jerrycan_fuel_descr:
WARNING: Explodes upon impact
 
 A large metal can filled with E95 gasoline. Jerrycans were brought to the Zone in large quantities by the Ukrainian military for their armoured vehicles. Initially, they served their purpose, but after the second Chernobyl Disaster vehicles for reasons still unknown were no longer operational. While some Zoners are still trying to make the wrecks work again, others have found alternate ways of utilising the jerrycans, namely, as improvised explosives. Upon direct hit, the canister will catch fire and explode after a slight delay. Although heavy and cumbersome, it is extremely powerful, and a well-placed jerrycan can be lethal even if the target wears the heaviest of body armours. On the other hand, the explosion is often so potent that the killer becomes the victim himself, so it's best to use these canisters with caution. There are rumours that a veteran stalker named Yuya once saved his skin by luring a pseudogiant into a jerrycan trap. He emptied his last Makarov magazine and the giant burst into flames with a roar that was heard throughout the Jupiter.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  technological item
  •  contains:  E95 gasoline
  •  hi-tier cooking fuel
  •  triggering mechanism: bullet impact or explosion
  •  blast power: high
  •  blast radius: 5.6 m
  •  fragments' radius: 28 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 39 (heavy metal fragments)
  •  explosion delay: ~3 seconds
en.st_jerrycan_fuel_empty_descr:
Empty metal can. It can only be used as material for the purposes of basic outfit repairs or sold to traders.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  technological item
en.st_jewelry_box_descr:
A small box that contains finely crafted jewellery. While it is not uncommon for stalkers to poach hooves, horns or teeth from the Zone's mutants, only a select few are skilled enough to craft such materials into treasure like this. However, few stalkers care for such trinkets, and few traders are in the business of exporting such finery.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  valuable
en.st_jgut_descr:
A haemostatic rubber tourniquet, allowing the user to stop bleeding.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  first-aid item
  •  fast usage (tourniquet)
en.st_joint_descr:
Known for their relaxing effects, joints are used by stalkers recreationally, especially those who frequent the Barrier or the Red Forest beyond it. Induces a soothing effect if combined with alcohol. Increases hunger.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  zone-produced
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_journal_descr:
A leather-bound journal. It's filled with the original bearer's inner thoughts, observations, and some rough sketches with notations. A light skim reveals helpful advice for the common man, but little else beyond sentimental value.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_jup_b1_half_artifact2_af_aac_descr:
Rare artefact. Protects from psi fields and slightly from electricity. It also has a field that lightens objects around it a little. No negative properties.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 12 mSv
  •  state: full
en.st_jup_b1_half_artifact2_af_aam_descr:
Rare artefact. Protects from psi fields and slightly from electricity. It also has a field that lightens objects around it a little. No negative properties.

  •  state: full
en.st_jup_b1_half_artifact2_af_iam_descr:
Rare artefact. Protects from psi fields and slightly from electricity. It also has a field that lightens objects around it a little. No negative properties.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  artefact storage device
  •  maximum capacity: 1
  •  permissible radiation level: 7 mSv
  •  state: full
en.st_jup_b1_half_artifact2_lead_box_descr:
Rare artefact. Protects from psi fields and slightly from electricity. It also has a field that lightens objects around it a little. No negative properties.
 
 PROPERTIES:

  •  full isolation
  •  state: full
en.st_jup_b32_scanner_device_desc:
This case combines an artefact detector, a battery and a powerful transmitter. The device will scan anomalies to determine the number and type of artefacts that appear. All of this information will be automatically relayed to the scientists' bunker.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
en.st_kerosene_descr:
Kerosene is used widely, for example in aviation as rocket fuel, and as firing in glass products, household lighting and heating devices. Being an excellent solvent, it easily reaches internal mechanisms and is therefore widely used in the cleaning and repair of various components.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  hi-tier cooking fuel
en.st_kit_hunt_descr:
A whole bag full of hooks, knives and other equipment used for skinning and gutting animals and mutants. Few stalkers carry professional equipment for mutant hunting. That is probably the reason why so many Zoners suffer from indigestion after eating mutant meat. Thanks to the variety of tools, the kit can effectively improve weapon and armour maintenance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  item storage
  •  usable as stash
  •  possession increases number of body parts obtained from mutants
en.st_knife_6x4_descr:
Soviet-Polish bayonet first adopted in 1972 for use with AK rifles. Although highly durable, it is much better at thrusting than it is at chopping or slashing.
 
  •  unsuitable for chopping thick-skinned mutants
en.st_knife_combat_descr: \n \nA large multi-purpose knife with a rugged rubber handle, commonly used by US soldiers since 1986. Sharp and well maintained. Although it's inconvenienced when facing heavily protected opponents, its toothed blade is ideal for causing massive, bleeding wounds to softer targets. This is makes it a perfect choice for finishing off wounded animals, or silently getting the drop on light infantry.
en.st_knife_hunting_descr: \n \nA modern, highly durable hunting knife with a large blade of stainless steel. Ideal for field dressing the meat off larger animals with thick hides. It is also able to cause massive, bleeding wounds to exposed flesh. As it wasn't intended for use in battle, it struggles against combat armours.
en.st_knife_needle_descr:
A combat knife, based on designs first adopted by the Soviet Army in WWII. It is technically surplus, and isn't officially used by any modern army.
 
This weapon consists of a 152 mm blade with a clip point, a large choil, a black wooden handle, and an S-shaped guard. The guard is "inverted" because standard Soviet Army grips frequently called for holding the knife with the edge facing upwards. The handle is enforced with rugged fabric for a good grip.
 
Although a good combat knife for its time, in the Zone its cutting power is suitable only for utility purposes or for finishing off already helpless opponents. Its piercing power, however, is something to be feared: it is easy to angle this blade's deadly point between the gaps of even modern combat armours.
 
  •  unsuitable for chopping thick-skinned mutants.
en.st_knife_swat_descr: A well-kept blade, ideal for special forces operators participating in surgical strikes. Rumoured to have averted several nuclear incidents during the Cold War. It is a deadly weapon and the only knife in the Zone that is relatively good at both piercing armours and dealing massive tissue damage. The ultimate combat cutlery.
en.st_knifebf4_descr: The OTs-04 knife was developed at the Tula Central Design Research Bureau (TsKIB) in the late 80s - early 90s and was intended for special forces of the Interior Ministry troops.
en.st_kolbasa_descr:
A package containing a meal of old bread and some smelly meat of unknown origin wrapped in brown paper. The look and smell suggest that some of it is moldy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low quality
en.st_kukri_descr: This is a special blade made of high-carbon spring-spring steel of the bus, which for many years stood in an anomal field, and therefore has excellent cutting and chopping properties. Ideal for cutting mutants of all stripes, and for protection against them.
en.st_lead_box_closed_descr:
The lead-lined metal container (LLMC) is a simple metal box with thick walls and foam inserts as well as a heavy lid with pressure-sealing mechanism. Specifically designed for transporting radioactive materials, in the Zone LLMC is most commonly employed as artefact storage and transportation device. It stops all radiation from leaking, thus ensuring safety of the user when in possession of artefacts. However, the device cannot be attached to the belt, which means that both positive and negative properties of artefacts won't apply.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  artefact storage device
  •  capacity:  1
  •  state:  full
 
 WARNING:
 
 You have to remove artefacts from the container prior to selling them.

en.st_leatherman_tool_descr:
A worn but functional multitool, used to disassemble weapons and armour on parts and to maintain worn and rusty trigger mechanisms.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  disassembling tool
  •  technological item
  •  toolkit
  •  high quality
  •  usable for weapon parts maintenance
en.st_letter_mercenary_desc:
A note written by one of the Mercenaries. Looks like he decided to write down some thoughts concerning his activities in the Zone. The purpose of it is unclear.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_letter_military_log_desc:
A printed transcription of the radio transmission between military units stationed in the Zone. The fact that it was in possession of one of the SKAT unit members indicates that he must have been involved in a clandestine operation, most probably concerned with the extraction of surveillance data.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  personal belongings
en.st_letter_military_stalker_desc:
A note found in a stash. Looks like someone was killing time during a long and boring night and then decided to leave the result of his work behind rather than throw it into the campfire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_letter_stalker_letter_3_desc:
A hand-written letter addressed to Nikolai. Most probably a part of a longer written conversation between two stalkers. Although correspondence in the Zone is conducted mainly by means of PDA messages, some prefer a traditional manner of communication, especially in case of most private matters and between friends. These letters are then handed to couriers who, like guides, are entrusted with some of the most difficult and dangerous tasks. It often takes a few days before a letter reaches its recipient, but still the probability of intercepting the message is much lower than in case of PDA communication. The courier profession is highly regarded among fellow stalkers and entails a position of significant influence in the stalker community.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_letter_to_outside_desc:
A letter apparently written by one of the stalkers to someone outside the Zone, most probably his wife or lover. The fact that you hold it in your hands suggests that it never reached the intended recipient.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_light_repair_kit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  very light and light armors
 
 This complex and heavy set includes everything necessary - from ultra-durable threads and needles to polymer-based patches - to conduct a complete repair of any light armor. Can be used regardless of materials involved, be it heavy cloth or military-grade kevlar sheets. Additional tools and kits increase effectiveness of repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  used for repairing light armor
en.st_marijuana_descr:
Self-grown cannabis. Smoking it is a popular pastime, especially among Freedomers who've served at the Barrier. Marijuana bags can be bought here and there in the Zone. Some believe that the drug helps retain a balance of the mind.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  slow usage (prolonged inhalation)
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_matches_descr:
A simple set of sticks of pine wood impregnated with resin. Anyone who has ever tried to light a fire in the open air knows that random gusts of wind can extinguish the flames very quickly. The firestarter set allows you to create a small but steady hearth fire, the temperature of which is significantly higher than that of paper or wax. An indispensable thing in any campaign, because it easy to light up even in the wet.


  •  is used for starting fires
en.st_meat_bloodsucker_descr:
A small hot meal made from bloodsucker meat spiced with chilies and mixed with mushrooms.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_boar_descr:
A small portion of boar meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and mixed with peppers. The most popular warm meal among stalkers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_chimera_descr:
A portion of grilled chimera meat, served with mushrooms and spices. An expensive meal, eaten most commonly by veteran Stalkers to celebrate accomplishment of difficult missions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_dog_descr:
A small hot meal of grilled dog chops mixed with garlic, peppers and mushrooms. A cheap alternative to the more popular boar beef.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_flesh_descr:
Slices of fat and greasy bacon made from mutated pigs commonly known as fleshes.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_lurker_descr:
A small portion of lurker meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and mixed with peppers. Good nutrition value due to thick muscles of the mutant.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_pseudodog_descr:
Portion of grilled pseudodog meat chops. Good nutrition value due to thick muscles of the animal.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_psysucker_descr:
A small hot meal made from psysucker meat spiced with chilies and mixed with mushrooms.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_snork_descr:
Grilled snork hand, ready to be eaten. WARNING: Most Zoners consider eating snork's meat cannibalistic and immoral. However, certain factions, such as bandits and mercenaries, include it in their meals so as to show their superiority over other groups.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_tushkano_descr:
2 small skewered tushkanos, grilled and seasoned with salt and chili pepper. The cheapest hot meal available in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_medium_repair_kit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  medium armors
 
 This complex and heavy set includes everything necessary - from ultra-durable threads and needles to polymer-based patches - to conduct a complete repair of any medium armor. Can be used regardless of materials involved, be it heavy cloth or military-grade kevlar sheets. Additional tools and kits increase effectiveness of repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  used for repairing medium armor

A medical package containing a variety of equipment for treatment of minor injuries.
 
 CONTENTS:
  •  bandage (4)
  •  diclofenac sodium
  •  improvised stimpack
  •  metamizole ampoule
  •  mineral water
  •  sulfadimethoxine
  •  tourniquet
  •  yadulin
 
 PROPERTIES:
