en.st_medkit_ai2_descr:
A military-grade medical package, containing a large amount of stimulating medical drugs.
 
 CONTENTS:
  •  ampoule of morphine
  •  anti-radiaton preparation
  •  aquatab tablets
  •  bandage (4)
  •  caffeine tablets
  •  diclofenac sodium
  •  harness (2)
  •  military stimulant
  •  mineral water
  •  027 R pill
  •  tetanus vaccine
 
 PROPERTIES:

en.st_medkit_ai3_descr:
A medical package, designed for use specifically in the Zone. It contains a large amount of drugs for the purposes of countering chemical, psy- and radioactive hazards.
 
 CONTENTS:
  •  anti-radiation drugs (2)
  •  antioxidant IP2
  •  big glucose shot
  •  cystamine (2)
  •  diclofenac sodium
  •  epinephrine
  •  harness
  •  indralin-B190
  •  mineral water
  •  psi-block
  •  scientific stimulant (2)
  •  sulfadimethoxine
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  storage for medical equipment
en.st_medkit_army_descr:
A specialised medical kit for providing first aid to combat casualties. The kit includes blood coagulants based on menadione, painkillers, antibiotics and immunostimulants, as well as a kit for removing bullets and fragments from the body. This medkit is issued primarily to army personnel such as Spetsnaz units venturing deep into the Zone and is popular among Duty forces.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 3%hp/s, total 100%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_medkit_descr:
A general purpose medical kit. Handy for treating injuries, wounds, chemical and thermal burns and various types of poisoning.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 1.8%hp/s, total 60%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_medkit_science_descr:
A medical kit designed specifically for use in the Zone. The kit contains products for handling wounds, as well as preventing the development of radiation poisoning and reducing accumulated radiation in the body. Contains Vikasolum, Batilolum and Naphazoline, unlike other medkits.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 3%hp/s, total 100%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  valuable
  •  high quality
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_meinkampf_descr:
Adolf Hitler's strategic memoires collected in a single book. The book and all that it stands for are hated by many, which makes this an item of high symbolic value. Adolf Hitler (20 April 1889 - 30 April 1945) was an Austrian-born German politician and the leader of the National Socialist German Workers Party (German: Nationalsozialistische Deutsche Arbeiterpartei (NSDAP), commonly referred to as the Nazi Party). He was chancellor of Germany from 1933 to 1945 and dictator of Nazi Germany (as Fuhrer und Reichskanzler) from 1934 to 1945. Hitler is responsible for the founding of Nazism, the start of World War II, and the Holocaust.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_memoirs_1_of_2_desc:
An old, faded notebook slipped into a card sleeve in order to protect it from wear and tear. However, it didn't withstand the passage of time well and only a small part of the text is legible.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_memoirs_2_of_2_desc:
An old, faded notebook slipped into a card sleeve in order to protect it from wear and tear. However, it didn't withstand the passage of time well and only a small part of the text is legible.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_merc_fp_descr:
This loose clan insignia depicts an azure bird of prey set against a black background. It is meant to be indicative of the Mercs' character as a faction of cold, precise, highly mobile soldiers of fortune, ready to capture or terminate their objectives at a moment's notice. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_metalcan_powder_descr:
WARNING: Explodes upon impact
 
 A small and moderately heavy metal can filled with a mixture of explosive industrial chemicals, metal bolts and nuts as well as black gunpowder retrieved from old ammunition. A notorious death trap designed by a group of Russian bandits known as "the Swireksters" and sold to various bandit groups operating in the Zone. Upon direct gunfire, the can will instantly explode with metal bolts and corrosive chemicals bursting in every direction. No one in their right mind should drop their guard when planning to make use of this deadly weapon. You can also use the metal parts of the can for emergency maintenance of outfits.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  technological item
  •  triggering mechanism: bullet impact or explosion
  •  blast power: low
  •  blast radius: 1.8 m
  •  fragments' radius: 14 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 77 (small metal pieces)
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_mil_amp_descr: A Burnt-Out Military Signal Amplification Unit That Has Been Torn From An Abandoned Vehicle. Junk To Most But Maybe Valuable To The Right People.
en.st_mil_car_descr: A Military Spec Radio Sometimes Found Around Broken Down Vehicles. Junk To Most, But Maybe Someone Out There Would Pay Handsomely For It.
en.st_mine_descr:
PFM-1 (short for противопехотная фугасная мина; NATO name: "Green parrot") used to be a standard-issue anti-personnel mine of the Red Army, employed mainly during the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan. Its widespread utilisation during the conflict led to high civilian casualties, especially among children, since randomly scattered mines were often mistaken for toys due to their familiar shape and colour. For this reason, the PFM-1 earned a sinister nickname: "Child killer." Since then, the mine has been replaced by newer models. However, as was the case with a variety of other 'retired' weaponry, a large number of these mines has somehow made its way into the Zone, becoming its primary booby-trap explosive. The mine is highly valued mainly for its functionality, user-friendliness, compact size and low weight, while its main drawback is a relatively small amount of explosive material: its power is often insufficient to kill a heavily armoured stalker with a single blast. For this reason, the mine should be used in combination with other explosive materials and it acts as an igniter. If it is not armed, the mine will not detonate, even when hit with a gun.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  military item
  •  anti-personnel mine
  •  triggering mechanism: pressure
  •  blast power: small
  •  blast radius: 2.2 m
  •  fragments' radius: none
  •  av. number of fragments: none
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_mineral_water_descr:
Mineral water from Ukrainian springs. Carbonated and with additional calcium.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  high quality
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_mint_descr:
Mint-flavoured altoids imported from the West. They are highly refreshing and remove radiation particles from the mouth. They also seem to reduce sleepiness for a short while. You can take as many as 10 mints at a time but that's only because your mouth isn't able to fit any more.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_mirror_descr:
Small mirror mounted on a telescopic iron tube. A handy item used by fighters versed in the arts of urban combat as it allows to peek around corners without getting shot.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
en.st_monolith_fp_descr:
This insignia pictures feathered wings in profile set against a golden sun - perhaps a symbol for the Wish Granter. The most intriguing aspect of this patch is that it is worn almost exclusively by a group perceived as brainwashed and insane. The very existence of this patch suggests that Monolith troops either retain a higher level of creativity than initially thought, or an outside force is covertly outfitting them. Monolith patches are prized among other groups, as they demonstrate the ability to fight against Monolith and live - an ability highly respected by the veterans of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_monolith_prayer_1_of_3_desc:
An untitled document comprising a few paragraphs one below another. Frequent references to the Monolith indicate a religious nature of the written text. The paper is preserved very well, which suggests that it has been treated with great care and respect so that its condition doesn't deteriorate.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_monolith_prayer_2_of_3_desc:
An untitled document comprising a few paragraphs one below another. Frequent references to the Monolith indicate a religious nature of the written text. The paper is preserved very well, which suggests that it has been treated with great care and respect so that its condition doesn't deteriorate.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_monolith_prayer_3_of_3_desc:
An untitled document comprising a few paragraphs one below another. Frequent references to the Monolith indicate a religious nature of the written text. The paper is preserved very well, which suggests that it has been treated with great care and respect so that its condition doesn't deteriorate.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_monolithian_thoughts_desc:
A hand-written sheet of paper. At the beginning, the writing of the note is extremely chaotic and untidy as if the person writing it was suffering from a severe mental disorder. Interestingly, the further down the sheet, the text becomes plainer, letters much clearer and the last words are written with an almost perfect, machine-like precision.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_morphine_descr:
An iron ampoule designed as field equipment for military field personnel for instant pain reduction. This ampoule contains a powerful dose of morphine. In clinical medicine, morphine is regarded as the gold standard of opioid analgesics used to relieve severe or agonizing pain and suffering. Like other opioids, such as oxycodone, hydromorphone, and diacetylmorphine (heroin), morphine acts directly on the central nervous system (CNS) to relieve pain. Injected into an arm or a thigh.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 10%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  large damage resistance bonus
en.st_mre_descr:
The Meal, Ready-to-Eat (commonly known as the MRE) is a self-contained, individual field ration in lightweight packaging, developed by the United States military for its service members for use in combat or other field conditions where organised food facilities are not available. One MRE can be used as one meal. The packaging of an MRE is designed to withstand rough conditions and exposure to the elements. Contains one course along with a variety of other food and drink items. While it can be eaten cold, it usually tastes much better when heated up with the included flameless ration heater (FRH, a water-activated exothermic reaction device that emits heat).
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military ration

  •  high quality
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  3 portions in one package. 1398 kcal in total
en.st_mutant_part_crow_beak_description:
While many stalkers consider crows no more than pests, more insightful ones acknowledge their usefulness in tackling the many challenges the Zone presents. While murders of crows can prove invaluable navigating and evading danger on the empty streets of Chernobyl and Pripyat, it's only after their death when their true value is manifested.
 
The population of crows grows constantly in spite of the increased knowledge of usefulness of their beaks. It seems accelerated adaptation, typical among Zone's fauna, has provided them with a sped-up reproduction cycle resulting in up to 4 egg lays a year. Their prolonged life-span, of up to 20 years, has given them extraordinary intelligence manifested especially when many crows are in proximity.
 
This last effect has led to a rather peculiar custom among the some of the Zone-dwellers which - as rumor has it - was introduced by the very first Stalkers who arrived in the Zone after the Second Incident. The ritual - aptly referred to as "The Beak" - involves taking a pulverized beak from the eldest crow in the murder and creating a special mixture. When the concoction is consumed by the light of the full moon, it allows one's mind to temporarily merge with the multi-consciousness shared by all crows in the Zone. No one knows what happens to a fragile human mind when it is subjected to such an experience, but some speculate that this is what led the Stalker Noah to build his Arc in a desperate attempt to preserve whatever possible from the inevitable cataclysm that is about to once again fall upon this already devastated land.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  mutated body part
  •  rare scientific specimen
  •  valuable
en.st_nuts_descr:
Assorted peanuts, hazelnuts, cashews and almonds in a nice and popular blend. Nutrition value is quite high. Imported from South Africa.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_oasis_heart2_descr: Apparently, it is a crystallized plant, has beneficial effect on the body as a whole. No negative properties.
en.st_partskit_descr: Highly advanced toolset including micro-files, cold weld metal epoxy, electrolysis bath setup, and tons of lubricants, petrol distillates and other solvents. The tools here can restore a Lada engine into a Ferrari, to say nothing of what it can do to machine components. Only the most destroyed pieces of scrap metal won't be able to be restored by this kit. However, this kit is extremely hard to put together and is thus sold in very small quantities by Zone technicians.\n\n
en.st_pda_1_descr:
A pocket-sized electronic device meant to encompass the basic and most vital functions of a computer. The PDA is essential for daily information sharing. It comes with pre-installed GPS module to provide geolocation and time information to the user.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  low electric power consumption
en.st_pda_2_descr:
A pocket-sized electronic device meant to encompass the basic and most vital functions of a computer. The PDA is essential for daily information sharing. It comes with pre-installed GPS module to provide geolocation and time information to the user. The module in this version has been improved to retrieve and process the position of other modules connected to the network in a radius of 300 meters, which makes this PDA compelling among stalkers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  low electric power consumption
  •  shows location of nearby squads from your group.
en.st_pda_3_descr:
A pocket-sized electronic device meant to encompass the basic and most vital functions of a computer. The PDA is essential for daily information sharing. It comes with pre-installed GPS module to provide geolocation and time information to the user. The module in this version has been greatly improved to retrieve and process the position of other modules connected to the network, which makes this PDA compelling among stalkers. Unlike usual GPS modules, this one relies on sets of codes that allows the module to acquire special privileges on the connected channel to acquire more information.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  low electric power consumption
  •  shows location of nearby natural squads.
en.st_pda_descr:
PDA with information about the Zone, digital logs, detailed maps of the Zone and locations of anomalies. Trading value could be high if you find the right buyer.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  low electric power consumption
en.st_pda_mlr_descr: A PDA containing possible information on routes between different areas. Its message history is inaccessible due to the presence of a password lock.
en.st_picture_woman_descr:
This photo contains a softly rendered figure, smiling back at you encouragingly. Great attention has been given to the lighting and the atmosphere around the person within the frame, demonstrating a thoughtful, observational tenderness.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings

en.st_placeable_exo_kit_descr:
An empty case stripped of any useful items. Many stalkers simply discard these repair kits after tending to their high tech suits, though the capacity and size of this one is useful when reused as storage.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  item storage

  •  moderate capacity
  •  usable as stash
en.st_placeable_gas_lamp_descr:
Generates light by igniting a wick doused in kerosene. Lanterns are an uncommon light source amongst stalkers as the fuel takes up weight and space in the backpacks that could otherwise be used for ammunition or priceless artefacts. Experienced stalkers that regularly travel along the path less troden make use of these lamps for their hideouts. This one has seen considerable wear over the years and appears to have lost its glass lampshade.
 
 PROPERTIES:

  •  placeable item
  •  low fuel consumption
  •  fuel: kerosene

en.st_porn2_descr:

en.st_porn_descr:
100 (somewhat old and crusty) pages worth of prime nude Russian girls. Common contraband among conscripts, criminals, and other unfortunates who are stuck in the Zone against their will. Some westerners joke about it saying: From Russia with love.
 
 PROPERTIES:

en.st_powder_poltergeist_descr:
"Diamond powder" is a common name given to crystal-like substance sometimes found in the belly of all species of psy creatures. It is not known what metabolic processes lead to its emergence and for this reason scientists are eager to pay large sums of money to lay their hands on it. Practical use is limited but some stalkers are known to sprinkle their most cherished hunting knives with it as it makes sharpening significantly easier. It also makes blades look shiny and well-kept.
 
  •  psy mutant metabolism product
  •  very rare scientific specimen
  •  valuable

en.st_prt_i_ammo_descr: Even with good supplies, it’s not uncommon to end up with one or more cartridges of what might be considered as “bad” ammunition. Unlucky stalkers might find themselves in very bad situations when their weapons jam at critical moments due to bad cartridges. On the contrary, these ammo parts can be reused for the creation of better variants. That's why some stalkers prefer to keep them around.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_capacitors_descr: Electric capacitors can store electricity. The simplest capacitor consists of two metal plates and a dielectric between them. It is a main component is most of electrical devices due to its important job in rectifying alternative current, storing electrical energy and bypassing noise. They are quite rare in the Zone, but they are very useful.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_copper_descr: Electrotechnical copper wire is used practically in all devices, devices, apparatuses, installations, machines where the production, transmission or use of electric energy occurs. In its pure form it is rare, but if necessary it can be easily extracted from common old radios, walkie-talkies and other electronics.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_fasteners_descr: Handful of screws, washers, nuts, nails and small pieces of metallic plates. A variety of many different types and sizes. Could be used to aid in repairing gear in the field, or perhaps even in crafting.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_paper_descr: Torn sheets of silk coated paper. Even in a place like the Zone, it can be used for all kind of things. The cheapest way for packaging food or cleaning dirt.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_plastic_descr: A small pack made of low density polyethylene film. These thin plastic membranes are used to separate areas or volumes, hold items and act as barriers. Plastic films are used in a wide variety of applications. Despite being partly torn, polyethylene's characteristics makes it a great solution for packaging and isolating, especially for food and medicine.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_resistors_descr: Resistors are the most common electronics components found in electronics. They limit and direct the passage of electrical current through circuit's branches to ensure other components are getting proper voltage feeding. This box contains a good set of resistors with different resistance values and tolerance, ranging from 12 up to 82M ohms.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_scrap_descr: Handful of metal bits and pieces of equipment. A variety of many different types and grades of steel and aluminum alloys. Could be used to aid in repairing gear in the field, or perhaps even in crafting.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_textolite_descr: Layered plastic based on fabric of fibers and polymeric binder (bakelite, polyester resin, epoxy resin). With proper skill it can be great help in repairing.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_transistors_descr: A box of high-quality BJT transistors. A transistor consists of three Semiconductor parts (base, emitter, collector) that serve together to generate, convert and amplify electrical oscillations. The ultimate dream of electronics engineers, if such a miracle will bring to the Area.\n \n
en.st_prt_i_wood_descr: Pieces of wide-grained, light cedar wood. Mostly used for outdoor projects such as furniture, decks and tools. White it's not that useful in a place like the Zone, it could be used in crafting.\n \n
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_1: Kevlar k129 plates w/ reinforced ceramic inserts
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_10: Grade-A polyethylene plates w/ expanded carrier
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_10_descr: Polyethylene plates that provide extra protection to vital areas. These hard armor plates have proven effective against all handgun bullets and a range of rifles. These upgraded ballistic vests have become standard in military use, as soft body armor vests are ineffective against military rifle rounds.
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_11_descr: Kevlar plates are widely known for their protective capabilities, and are highly valued because of this feature. They perform a wide variety of functions, the most important of which is absorbing the impact of firearm projectiles on the front and the back of the torso. They constitute a lightweight alternative to heavy steel plates. Additionally, any type of armour plating also helps maintain suits in good condition, preventing degradation through wear and tear. Used by military units the world over.

en.st_prt_o_fabrics_1_descr: The very base of an outfit. These sheets are made of different materials such as cotton, polycotton, wool and leather to provide comfort and durability. Other protective fabrics are used like rubber and ballistic nylon, along with joint protections and a set of hardware and zippers.
en.st_prt_o_fabrics_2_descr: The very base of an outfit. These textiles blended with synthetic materials such as polyester and lycra to provide versatility and durability. Other protective fabrics are used like rubber and ballistic nylon, along with joint protections and a set of hardware and zippers.
en.st_prt_o_fabrics_3_descr: These sheets are made of different materials such as polyester, leather and canvas, including a set of hardware and zippers. Good durability in harsh environmental conditions, which is why such materials are suitable for traveling even inside the Zone.
en.st_prt_o_fabrics_4_descr: Sheets of military-grade textiles are often used for field clothing and light armor. Valued for its relatively low price and high versatility, this material is commonly used by the Zoners. Other protective fabrics are used like rubber and ballistic nylon, along with joint protections and a set of hardware and zippers.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_10_descr: The thermal degradation behaviour of barium-sulfate makes it a great choice for oufits used inside the Zone. Usually coated on polymer sheets for considerable body coverage. It can provide protection against other types of hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_11_descr: Multilayer Aluminized fabrics are specifically designed for protective apparel and shields used in environments that pose serious fire risk or safety hazards associated with radiant heat and chemical sources. In addition, these fabrics offer great isolatation against psi-waves effects.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_12_descr: Multilayer Aluminized fiberglass fabrics are specifically designed for protective apparel and shields used in environments that pose serious shock risk or safety hazards associated with radiant heat and chemical sources. In addition, these fabrics offer great isolatation against psi-waves effects.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_13_descr: PBI-blended fabrics have been trusted in the fire service over the years. Recognized as the leading high-performance protective fire resistant fabrics. For this reason, Zoners took advantage of these fabrics for their own outfits.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_14_descr: PBI-blended fabrics have been trusted in the fire service over the years. Recognized as the leading high-performance protective fire resistant fabrics. For this reason, Zoners took advantage of these fabrics for their own outfits.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_15_descr: Originally developed for use in chemical warfare suits. Activated Carbon Cloth now has many relevant uses in defense, industrial, and medical applications. It considerably enhances the efficacy of both advanced and active wound dressings, along with providing great protection from radiation particles.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_16_descr: Originally developed for use in chemical warfare suits. Activated Carbon Cloth now has many relevant uses in defense, industrial, and medical applications. It considerably enhances the efficacy of both advanced and active wound dressings, along with providing great protection from radiation particles.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_17_descr: Theses inserts made of constantan sheets. They acts as dielectric layers to protect the outfit and it's wearer from electic shocks, psi-waves and radioactive materials to a certain extent. It can also offer protection against other hazards, which is why they found their use inside the Zone.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_18: Insulating constantan inserts w/ fiberglass coating
en.st_prt_o_retardant_18_descr: Theses inserts made of constantan sheets and fiberglass-coated fabrics. They acts as dielectric layers to protect the outfit and it's wearer from electic shocks, psi-waves and radioactive materials to a certain extent. It can also offer protection against other hazards, which is why they found their use inside the Zone.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_19_descr: High temperature resistant fabrics woven from “E" glass fibers and coated with Vermiculite based film providing extended service temperatures up to 1500°F and good shock resistance up to 20Kv. In a place like the Zone, these fabrics can come in handy against anomolous hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_1_descr: These textiles that are naturally more resistant to fire than others through chemical treatment or manufactured fireproof fibers. In the Zone, such fabrics are commonly used in outfits to provide protection against hazardous environment and flame-based anomalies such as Burner and Comet.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_20_descr: High temperature resistant fabrics woven from “E" glass fibers and coated with Vermiculite based film providing extended service temperatures up to 1700°F and good shock resistance up to 25Kv. In a place like the Zone, these fabrics can come in handy against anomolous hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_2_descr: These textiles that are more resistant to electric shock and chemical particles than others through chemical treatment or manufactured fireproof fibers. In the Zone, such fabrics are commonly used in outfits to provide protection against hazardous environment and chemical/shock-based anomalies such as Electro and Fruit Punch.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_3_descr: Rigid Polyvinyl Chloride ( RPVC ) is a non-flammable material that is resistant to weathering. RPVC can also be UV stabilized to provide higher protection against anomolous hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_4_descr: Rigid Polyvinyl Chloride ( RPVC ) is a non-flammable material that is resistant to weathering. RPVC can also be UV stabilized to provide higher protection against anomolous hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_5_descr: A tough and durable PVC coated polyester and rubber-fibre fabric designed for use in providing protection against hazards. It can be sewn, glued or welded. \nDouble coated material which has an extremely tough core polyester fabric and is coated on both sides with pvc.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_6_descr: A tough and durable PVC coated polyester and carbon-fibre fabric designed for use in providing protection against hazards. It can be sewn, glued or welded. \nDouble coated material which has an extremely tough core polyester fabric and is coated on both sides with pvc.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_7_descr: This magnesium grid acts as dielectric layers to protect the outfit and it's wearer from powerful electic shocks and psi-waves to a certain extent. It can also offer protection against other hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_8_descr: This magnesium grid acts as dielectric layers to protect the outfit and it's wearer from powerful electic shocks and psi-waves to a certain extent. It can also offer protection against other hazards.
en.st_prt_o_retardant_9_descr: The thermal degradation behaviour of bismuth-sulfate makes it a great choice for oufits used inside the Zone. Usually coated on polymer sheets for considerable body coverage. It can provide protection against other types of hazards.
en.st_prt_o_support_1_descr: Mechanical frame powered by a system of electric motors, pneumatics, levers and hydraulics that give the wearer both superior protection as well as greatly increased physical strength.
en.st_psy_helmet_desc: A psy-helmet designed to fit under regular headgear. It was developed under the leadership of Sakharov at the research station near Yantar. The unique layout of the helmet, consisting of electrical artefacts together with the device’s mounted antennas operate on the principle of the shield. When activated, the helmet projects an invisible dome near the carrier, acting on the energised particles released by the Shell artefact, thanks to which most of the radiation is extinguished, then the remnants are reflected by the protection system built directly into the helmet’s body. The uniqueness of this Psy-helmet lies in its ability to withstand the unusual mind-altering psy-frequencies of the various DUGA emitters within the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone.
en.st_radio2_descr:
A small radio in a poor condition. Dirty and damaged by moisture. The interior seems to be in quite a bad shape as the radio rattles when moved around. No to little value.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  broken beyond repair
  •  unusable
en.st_radio_descr:
Music is a good way to calm your nerves. But with a broken antenna this radio is of little use. Moisture and dirt have also damaged this item.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  broken beyond repair
  •  unusable
en.st_raid_anomaly_visor_descr:
Does something.
 
 •  Highest pierced armour class: none
 •  Tissue damage rating: medium - high
 
SPECIAL:
 
 •  expanding cloud of pellets, short eff. range
en.st_raid_fuel_descr:
Fuel that can be used for vehicles.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  hi-tier fuel

en.st_raisins_descr:
A pack of raisins. Rich in nutrients, balances sugar in the blood.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_ramrod_tool_descr:
An old ramrod consisting of three composite wooden parts, used to restore parts such as worn or rusty barrels and gas tubes.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  toolkit
  •  high quality
  •  usable for weapon parts maintenance
en.st_rasp_tool_descr:
A file, used to restore weapon parts such as a worn or rusty barrel or breech head.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  toolkit
  •  high quality
  •  usable for weapon parts maintenance
en.st_ration_ru_descr:
Breakfast, dinner and supper all in one package. Includes various food items whose function is to provide the body with all minerals and microelements essential for your health as well as cooking equipment (small metal frame, fuel tablets, matches, striker) and other items (e.g. napkins) facilitating use in field conditions. Comes with a polymeric box that protects the ingredients from hazardous environmental conditions. The polymeric box has 3 sections, each respectively for breakfast, dinner and supper.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military ration
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  7 portions in one package. 3661 kcal in total
en.st_ration_ukr_descr:
This Ukrainian combat ration is based on a previous Russian version, and comprises commercially available cans and dried food items packed together in a sectioned box (resembling a takeout tray) made of very thin green plastic. Contains all that is necessary to provide a healthy adult with all calories and minerals needed during a single day.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military ration
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  6 portions in one package. 3186 kcal in total
en.st_rebirth_descr:
Warning! Do not use in combination with any other drug as this may prove lethal. This powerful mixture contained in a small syringe will make you lose consciousness. But when you wake up (if you wake up), you will feel reborn. Inject the syringe into your thigh when sitting down.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 22.5%hp/s, total 190%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  causes temporary blackout
en.st_recipe_advanced_descr:
Manual of mechanical engineering. Some people read such books to expand their expertise and learn more about the facilities and factories in the Zone. Contains details about basic mechanical and electrical equipments.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  informative
  •  craft recipe
  •  valuable
en.st_recipe_ammo_descr:
Every stalker should learn to choose a gun, but also know how to choose ammunition for it. This guide provides informations about various types of ammunition, plus an in-depth view about the basic components of cartridges.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  informative
  •  craft recipe
  •  valuable
en.st_recipe_basic_descr:
This guide details basic survival skills, and provides an overview of common survival kits. The later chapters describe the creation of basic gear out of common materials.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  informative
  •  craft recipe
  •  valuable
en.st_recipe_cooking_descr:
A couple of handwritten pages, contains detailed recipes regarding marinating mutant meat in alcohol by certain tempretures. According to the notes, it reduces the harming effects of radiated meat. Seems like the author is an experienced zoner.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  informative
  •  cooking recipe
  •  valuable
en.st_recipe_drug_descr:
A couple of pages torn off from a book. Handwritten in blue ink that got smudgy due to the effect of environmental factors, which makes the text extremely hard to make out. The written notes describe the creation of various types of drugs and medicines using common medical supplies.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  informative
  •  craft recipe
  •  valuable
en.st_recipe_expert_descr:
Manual of industrial engineering. Quite informative. It describes the operation of modern electronics: operational amplifiers, semiconductor diodes, bipolar junction transistors, and field effect transistors. The second part of this manual deals with troubleshooting electrical devices.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  informative
  •  craft recipe
  •  valuable
en.st_redemption_2_documents_descr: Documents found at the Promzone. It seems that most of the pages are damaged. The remaining ones contain illegible handwriting with calculations, formulas, and routes.
en.st_redemption_2_vodka_box_descr: A heavy crate for the dynamite, filled with bottles of vodka.
en.st_redemption_3_device_descr: A device for measuring radiation, issued by Professor Sakharov. It's full of incomprehensible buttons and numbers displayed on the screen.
en.st_redemption_4_documents_descr: A weighty folder with documents from the Promzone. It is filled with various descriptions, instructions, and formulas.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_1_descr: A laptop found at the Collider. It doesn't turn on, the battery has been dead for a long time.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_2_descr: A PDA found at the Collider. It doesn't work, but scientists might be able to retrieve the necessary information from it.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_3_descr: A small folder with documents found at the Collider. It contains descriptions of experiments.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_4_descr: Boards from devices found at the Collider. It's unclear what they are for, but scientists will most likely be able to figure it out.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_5_descr: A note from a scientist found at the Collider. Concepts of one of the scientists working on the Collider for improving the emitter's performance.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_6_descr: A notebook with observations found at the Collider. It contains observations about experiments.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_7_descr: A notepad with personal notes found at the Collider. It's the diary of one of the laboratory workers.
en.st_redemption_lab_item_8_descr: A work report found at the Collider. It contains the names of project supervisors and the group leader.
en.st_renegade_fp_descr:
This faction insignia depicts a jaundiced-looking scorpion set against a lush green shield. That this item exists would imply the Zone's renegades once possessed a higher goal, although no one today would believe they band together out of anything but sheer desperation. Still, this item is kept in circulation among all true renegades, possibly out of nostalgia.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_repair_kit_p_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  9mm, .45 and .357 caliber weapons
 
 This kit contains oils, solvents, basic cleaning equipment and specialized tools used for disassembly and maintenance of mechanisms of weapons. It also by standard comes with set of elementary firearm spare parts. The kit is quite heavy, but is irreplaceable when venturing deep into the Zone as it can be used in life-or-death situations to make a firearm usable again. Due to differences in weapon construction this particular set can only be used for disassembly and repair of weapons with handgun calibers. It's also possible to additionally increase the effectiveness of the kit by borrowing certain materials from or combining with other kits during a single maintenance session.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_repair_kit_r5_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  5.45 and 5.56 caliber weapons
 
 This kit contains oils, solvents, basic cleaning equipment and specialized tools used for disassembly and maintenance of mechanisms of weapons. It also by standard comes with set of elementary firearm spare parts. The kit is quite heavy, but is irreplaceable when venturing deep into the Zone as it can be used in life-or-death situations to make a firearm usable again. Due to differences in weapon construction this particular set can only be used for disassembly and repair of medium-caliber rifles. It's also possible to additionally increase the effectiveness of the kit by borrowing certain materials from or combining with other kits during single maintenance session.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_repair_kit_r7: Medium and large caliber rifle fixing kit
en.st_repair_kit_r7_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  7.62, 7.92, 9x39 and .338 caliber weapons
 
 This kit contains oils, solvents, basic cleaning equipment and specialized tools used for disassembly and maintenance of mechanisms of weapons. It also by standard comes with set of elementary firearm spare parts. The kit is quite heavy, but is irreplaceable when venturing deep into the Zone as it can be used in life-or-death situations to make a firearm usable again. Due to differences in weapon construction this particular set can only be used for disassembly and repair of large-caliber rifles. It's also possible to additionally increase the effectiveness of the kit by borrowing certain materials from or combining with other kits during single maintenance session.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment

 This kit contains oils, solvents, basic cleaning equipment and specialized tools used for disassembly and maintenance of mechanisms of weapons. It also by standard comes with set of elementary firearm spare parts. The kit is quite heavy, but is irreplaceable when venturing deep into the Zone as it can be used in life-or-death situations to make a firearm usable again. Due to differences in weapon construction this particular set can only be used for disassembly and repair of weapons with 12ga shotgun caliber. It's also possible to additionally increase the effectiveness of the kit by borrowing certain materials from or combining with other kits during single maintenance session.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_rioc_duty_desc: This PDA confirms Petrenko's missing soldier is dead after all. Looks like he gave as good as he got.
en.st_rioc_ecolog_desc: A computer encased in a reinforced container, according to the scientists this is a brand new detector prototype destined to change the world of artefact hunting. Unfortunately none of the graphs and numbers make any sense to you.
en.st_rioc_sid_desc: A sealed container you found on a dead stalker, it must be the shipment Sidorovich was talking about.
en.st_rope_descr:
A good rope serves many purposes, especially in a place like the Zone. Many stalkers can put it to good use, which generates a rather high trading value. About 10-metres long.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  basic material
en.st_rotten_meat_cooked_descr: Zone produced meal, which was not consumed in time. After five days have passed, this bowl of stinky remains of food is beyond saving. What a terrible loss, indeed. Best course of action is to get rid of it as soon as possible, because the smell might attract some creatures, which might be not so picky...
en.st_roubles_1000_descr:
Trade in the Zone is conducted mainly by means of electronic transactions for safety and managing risks. But many stalkers keep at least a few banknotes in their pockets in case they want to buy smaller things like cigarettes. This makes life easier and conserves battery life.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  cash
  •  universally recognised currency unit

Trade in the Zone is conducted mainly by means of electronic transactions for safety and managing risks. But many stalkers keep at least a few banknotes in their pockets in case they want to buy smaller things like cigarettes. This makes life easier and conserves battery life.

en.st_roubles_descr:
Trade in the Zone is conducted mainly by means of electronic transactions for safety and managing reasons. But many stalkers keep at least a few roubles in their pockets in case they want to buy smaller things like cigarettes. This makes life easier and conserves battery life.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_salicidic_acid_descr:
An iron ampoule designed as field equipment for military field personnel for instant pain reduction. It contains a powerful dose of metamizole mixed with an antihemorrhagic drug. Metamizole is one of the strongest Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drugs (NSAIDs), especially effective at easing aches and pains as well as reducing fevers. It is also useful as anti-inflammatory drug when used in higher doses. May cause some delayed side effects such as leucopenia or agranulocytosis, so it should be used with moderation. Injected into an arm or a thigh. Its availability in the Zone is limited due to the difficulty of smuggling the medicine across military cordons.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 10%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  moderate damage resistance bonus
en.st_salmon_descr:
Ukrainian smoked salmon. As soon as it's brought to the Zone, the fish changes hands until it finds its way to the highest bidder. Very valuable.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_sausage_descr:
Made of beef and pork. Smoked and vacuum packaged, it can be preserved for long periods of time. This particular piece has been imported from the Russian Federation. Famous among certain Russian mafia leaders for its exceptional flavour and taste.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_sewing_kit_a_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and light headgear sets
 
 This advanced set contains more and better sewing accessories than its basic counterpart. Double reels of nylon thread and a large selection of higher-quality needles make it suitable for working on thicker and harder materials, including lighter mutant skins and artificial fibers. It is also capable of repairing more damaged outfits.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_sewing_kit_b_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and light headgear sets
 
 A light sewing kit consisting of a cloth reel, several steel needles and a pair of scissors. It can be used to sew up bullet holes or ruptures in soft fabrics of outfits. Its practical applications are limited due to the short length of the thread and subpar durability of needles, so the kit will be useless in case of more serious damage. For the same reason, it's compatible with only a handful of materials. Nonetheless, it is strongly advised to always use whatever is available to make the kit more effective.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_sewing_kit_h_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  all outfits and light headgear sets
 
 This military-grade, heavy sewing kit is designed to handle fractures in protective plates of modern combat armors. It contains enough metallic thread to put together outfits that have literally been torn apart. Capable of sewing on even hardest of mutant hides to your armor of choice. Another advantage of the kit are the basic mechanical tools that can be used to disassemble outfits and headgear in order to salvage repair materials. It's the highest quality sewing kit available in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_sewing_thread_descr:
This sewing thread is made out of many different materials including cotton, linen, nylon, and silk. Every stalker knows it's not easy to avoid cloth tearig every while and then due to the harsh environment inside the Zone. Saving a couple of sewing threads for long trips is a wise idea.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  usable for outfit parts maintenance
en.st_sharpening_stones_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  suited for knives and blades
 
 Blunt knives and tools? It doesn't have to be that way. Super-practical 3 piece grindstone set for everyone, packed in a nice polyester bag. No more loose grindstone, sliding about in drawers, scratching everything - no, everything is now in its place. For perfect sharpening, three important grains for pre-grinding, sharpening and for the subsequent stripping of the blade are integrated in the set, so you can achieve a razor-sharp cutting edge.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  toolkit
  •  high quality
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_shovel_mili_descr:
High-quality black military shovel. Used for numerous field purposes. Training regimen of Spetsnaz soldiers covers hand-to-hand combat and use of hand-held weapons and other equipment for the purposes of eliminating enemies. One famous example is the entrenching shovel which is a formidable weapon in close combat when used by a Spetsnaz operator.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
en.st_shovel_old_descr:
An old metal shovel used for various field purposes. Few people actually keep shovels in their backpacks as they are quite commonly found in the Zone, especially in industrial areas.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_sleepingpills_descr:
A package of alprazolam 0.25 mg tablets, also known as 027 R. Alprazolam is known among chemists for its ability to reduce depression, anxiety and panic disorders. Invaluable for anyone exploring Yantar, Radar, the Red Forest or any of the underground labs. Side effects include sleepiness. Best taken with water, but some stalkers opt for caffeine instead.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  immediate sleepiness induction
en.st_solvent_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
  •  suited for all weapons
 
 Western-made, high-quality firearm cleaning solvent, especially adapted for use in harsh environmental conditions, the Hoppe's No. 9 Bore Cleaning remains perhaps the most commonly used solution. Like all cleaning solvents, it is designed for preventing rust and removing powder, lead and metal fouling, but its unique property is that it makes heavy particles less likely to stick to mechanical parts of a firearm. This proves especially useful in the irradiated Zone. Substance acts quickly, is super-efficient, safe and easy to use. Although it flows freely and penetrates rapidly, it is still advisable to use tools or fabrics to increase spread.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
  •  liquid gun cleaning solvent
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  usable for repairing equipment
en.st_stalker_fp_descr:
Commonly worn by unaligned stalkers, this patch is deemed a collectible by mercenaries, who exchange badges like this for spoils from a mysterious patron. As loners are numerous, yet often split and alone, they're considered easy pickings by the more organized and predatory groups in the Zone. 
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
  •  valuable
en.st_stalker_letter_1_of_2_desc:
A couple of pages torn off from a memoir. Handwritten in blue ink that got smudgy due to the effect of environmental factors, which makes the text extremely hard to make out. Author unknown.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_stalker_letter_2_of_2_desc:
A couple of pages torn off from a memoir. Handwritten in blue ink that got smudgy due to the effect of environmental factors, which makes the text extremely hard to make out. Author unknown.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  personal belongings
en.st_steel_wool_descr:
Steel wool, also known as wire wool or wire sponge, is a bundle of strands of very fine soft steel filaments. It is used as an abrasive in finishing and repair work for polishing wood or metal objects, cleaning household cookware, and sanding in light painting. Steel wool is made from low-carbon steel (carbon content is low enough to be close to plain iron). It is not made by drawing "steel wool wire" through a tapered die, but rather by a process more like broaching where a heavy steel wire is pulled through a toothed die that removes a thin wire shaving. Bundles of steel wool can be used in precision equipment cleaning and to improve spreading of lubricants and cleaning solvents.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  technological item
en.st_stim_impro_descr:
Improvised stimpacks are popular among novice Zoners as they are easy to obtain and inexpensive. Produced in the Zone from commonly available ingredients, without proper equipment and purification. This is the cause of many side effects which include headache, paraesthesia and considerable increase in nutrition demand. Injected in the thigh.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 4.2%hp/s, total 50%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  zone-produced
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  moderate body recovery time
en.st_stim_military_descr:
Military stims constitute a part of standard-issue soldier equipment for field operations in the Zone... in theory. In practice, most grunts never see these stims. Meanwhile, they're available with suspicious ease on the black market and can be acquired by most stalkers for a moderate price. Popular among experienced Zoners. They are significantly more potent and faster working than their improvised counterparts, which makes them perfect for use in life-threatening situations. Produced from raw agents of high density which can take their toll on the body. Side effects include extreme dizziness and increased hunger.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 6%hp/s, total 90%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  military item
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  fast body recovery time
en.st_stim_scientic_descr:
Created by the same defence research institute in Kiev which developed the well-known SEVA suit, this state-of-the-art solution constitutes the most potent health stabiliser available in the Zone. Best quality ingredients and perfected formula enable almost instant recuperation and ensure prompt radiation cleansing. Side effects are minimised. Extremely high cost practically limits the target group of the drug to most skilful and successful stalkers.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 6%hp/s, total 90%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  rapid body recovery time
en.st_strelok_pendrive_descr: This pendrive contains plenty of encrypted data: the backup copy of Strelok's many findings throughout the years. Invaluable piece of evidence regarding the top secret experiments that allegedly created the Zone.
en.st_survival_kit_descr:
Survival kit containing fabric, sewing needles and a few leather strips. Primarily used as a means to stop the bleeding and treat lacerations, in the hands of a skilled user this small survival kit may prove essential during prolonged excursions in the Zone. It can also be utilized for outfit repairs of even most severe damage.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 3.6%hp/s, total 162%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  high quality
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  immediately stops heavy bleeding
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_swiss_descr:
Want to open cans of food, keep your mechanical gear tight, cut ropes or sharpen your best bullets? Use the universal and elegant Swiss knife. Packed in a small box. Commonly found in the Zone, so it is of little value. However, it can be utilised as a supportive material in both weapon and outfit repairs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  disassembling tool
en.st_synthrope_descr:
Synthetic ropes are commonly found in military warehouses. But for some reason few military stalkers actually carry them. A good rope serves many purposes, especially in a place like the Zone. Many stalkers can put this to good use, which generates a rather high trading value. Each is about 5 metres long.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
en.st_tactical_knife_descr: [RUSSIAN ACCENT "ON"] It is rumoured, these blades are produced in very a few by masters from a groupment Monolithh. Threw composition of alloy not known - it is talked to extract him it is possible only in the heart of sarcophagus.[RUSSIAN ACCENT "OFF"]
en.st_tango6_scope_desc:
PROPERTIES:
  •  Origin: United States
  •  Manufacturer: SIG Sauer
  •  magnification: 1.0x - 6.0x
en.st_tarpaulin_descr:
A tarpaulin (or hootch) is a large sheet of strong, flexible, water-resistant or waterproof material, often cloth such as canvas or polyester coated with urethane, or made of plastics such as polyethylene. It has reinforced grommets at the corners and along the sides to form attachment points for rope, allowing them to be tied down or suspended. Serves many purposes, but is mainly used to create small and simple tent-like hideouts. Trading value is low due to easily found alternatives.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
en.st_tea_descr:
Beard's popular hot tea made from a mixture of sugar, edible dried mushrooms and boiled water that is said to be radiation-free. Stalkers who can afford to buy the drink often take it for long trips in the Zone. It's a good and healthy way to stay on your toes when you're getting tired or when you're out exploring on cold nights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_tetanus_descr:
Tetanus vaccine is composed of inactivated tetanus toxin and is used to prevent an individual from contracting tetanus. Tetanus, also known as lockjaw, is a disease caused by the bacteria Clostridium tetani which enter the body through open wounds and release a poison called tetanospasmin. Tetanus is a potentially deadly disease because the poison attacks the nervous system blocking nerve signals from the spinal cord to and from the muscles. Animals and mutants alike are prone to carry Clostridium tetani which can be transferred through bites. Injection of inactivated toxin enhances your immunological system and can lead to several positive side-effects. Moreover, this vaccine has been supplemented with several additional anti-toxins making it usable for purposes other than preventing contraction of tetanus.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 0.06%hp/s, total 26.5%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_tobacco_descr:
Cigarettes are expensive and rare in the Zone, and having raw tobacco enables you to produce your own cigs at a lower cost. This tin is sealed, which ensures that the tobacco will stay fresh for days or weeks depending on the conditions it's kept in.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  slow usage (roll up)
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  low quality
en.st_tomahawk_descr: Tactical tomahawk, multitool and breaching tool, all-in-one solution.
en.st_tomato_descr:
Canned, sliced and diced tomatoes are imported to the Zone on a regular basis. The best before date on the bottom suggests they're still fresh.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_trigger_components_2: Double fire mode trigger mechanism with hammer
en.st_trigger_components_2_descr: Dual-mode hammer type trigger. Designed for the conduct of automatic and single fire.\n \n
en.st_trigger_components_3: Triple fire mode trigger mechanism with hammer
en.st_trigger_components_3_descr: Triple fire mode hammer type trigger. Designed for the conduct of automatic, single and double fire. Strongly tied to the design of the weapon.\n \n
en.st_trigger_components_4: Single fire mode trigger mechanism with firing pin
en.st_trigger_components_4_descr: Single fire mode trigger mechanism with firing pin.\n \n
en.st_trigger_components_5: Double fire mode trigger mechanism with firing pin
en.st_trigger_components_5_descr: Double fire mode trigger mechanism with firing pin. Allows shooting in single and automatic fire.\n \n
en.st_trigger_components_6_descr: Trigger mechanism with hammer from a double-barrel shotgun.\n \n
en.st_tushonka_descr:
Tushonka is a common name of canned, stewed meat produced in the Soviet Union and other Warsaw Pact countries. The irony is that the idea originally came to Russia in a form of World War II aid transports from the United States. Since then, various kinds of tushonkas have become a primary means of long-time meat preservation, used both by the civilian population and as a standard-issue Red Army food ration. Despite their long expiry date, tushonkas are known for their high nutrition value (mostly owing to high fat content) and a relatively good taste. The Chernobyl Exclusion Zone has seen hundreds of types and tastes of tushonkas. In the spring of 2013 'Abakan' minced-meat brand remains the unquestionable king, and certainly the Zone has seen worse than that.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_underwear_descr:
An extra pair of socks, a shirt and pants could substantially increase your comfort. Unfortunately, this set is completely soaked. There is little chance any stalker will pay for this garbage. Although they might seem worthless, the material the underwear is made of can be used in armour and weapon maintenance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  personal belongings
en.st_up_add_a1_descr: External threading allows a silencer to be installed.
en.st_up_add_a2_descr: Installation of a mount for attachment of an optical scope.
en.st_up_add_a3_descr: Installation of a mount for attachment of an underbarrel grenade launcher.
